gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasantasantānārāma rāmacandra
munīndraprasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇakiraṇa prasannāntaḥ
karaṇa kavicakravartibiruda kavidhāḷalōcana janārdana
dēva viracitamappa anantanāthapurāṇadoḷ
janmābhiṣēka varṇanaṁ candrōdayavarṇanaṁ
saptamāśvāsaṁ

div.head: aṣṭamāśvāsaṁ
div.p:
va.antu polamaṭṭadhirājamārgambiḍidu naḍetandu vipaṇi
vīdhiyarkkelaṅgaḷoḷ kikkiragida kusumāṅgada lēpanāṅgada kalpalate
gaḷante ninda nīṟara manamaṁ belegoṇḍu māḍuva mālegārtiyara
ghaṭṭi vaḷḷiyaraṅgaparimaḷadoḷ daḷambaḍedu maḍugaṭṭi pariva māsā
sigadōgaradana saurabhasaṅgamadoḷīsuvante vilāsadiṁ nusuḷu
barpāgaḷa kaṅgaḷaṅgaḷakke vanda kuḍumiñcina kuḍiyannaḷappa canne yo
rvaḷ

lg.l: poreda vilāsamoppe naḍetarpaḷanānr̥ pakantu kaṇḍu ka !
ppurada purandri malligeya mānini muttina mugdha cittajaṁ
karuviḍe sanda candanada leppada sundariyendu nōḍidaṁ

div.p:
va.ākeyaṁ kaṇḍu nāgarikaṁ—ī naḍeva nuḍiva candra kaleya
lāvaṇyacandrikeyoḷemma nāyakara nayanacakōrigaḷa pāraṇevaḍedu
paṭuvāduvu innāva lēsumaṁ nōḍaloḷavu naḍeyimendu barevare
div.head: aṣṭamāśvāsaṁ
div.p:
va.antu banda mandānilanōlagakkālōkanada nimilana ma
vasaraṅguḍe sūḷegēliyaṁ pugutarpāgaḷondu sudhādhavaḷabhavanamaṇi
kuṭṭi mapraghaṇāntaradoḷ beṭṭiṅgaḷa bittanagevoydante muguḷḷu
meṟava mādhaviya maṇḍapada baḷasinoḷage paḷukina kumbhadoḷaṁ taḷara
mellesaḷaḷoḷaṁ muguḷa lambaṇadoḷaṁ muttina miḷiyoḷaṁ bittagaṁ
baḍeda naviluyyala pūvina tambulada katturiya kappu rada bīyada
bāyinada vilāsamaccariyāge pacce vaḍisiduyyala maṇiya kaḍeyaṁ
piḍidu citravallabhanotti sārci māṅgaḷikamanugūḍise tuṅgakucabharālasa
gamane naḍetandu nindu nōḍi

lg.l: tudikoḷisirda vāmacaraṇaṁ maṇiyaṁ baladaṅghra meṭṭe miṁ
cida toḍe rajju vaṁ piḍida tōḷa modal pogaraṁ tuḷuṅke nōṁ
kida moleyoḍḍu koṅki nimirdolnaḍu kaṅgoḷipanna muyyalē

div.p:
va.mattondeḍeyoḷoleva bharadoḷ maleva mukhakke candra
maṇḍalamumaṁ, hārada poḷapiṅge tārāvaḷiyumaṁ, nusuyya
saurabhakke kavvaregoṇḍu bembiḍade tūruva tumbiya turugalambara
doḷuṭidu bambalgoḷḷanteyuṁ kīṟubi pāyi nīḍumāḍi bemarta
cittēśvariya gāḍiyaṁ nōḍi tambelara sōṅku bembaṭigoḷḷantu
mellamellanoledu

lg.l: tprati kuḷirdeḍegoṭṭa baṭṭadoḍeyaṁ taḷtēṟi nallaḷa prabhā

div.p: va.mattamondu khēlanavilāsavāsāṅgaṇadoḷorvaḷ

lg.l: muḍiyiṁ jhampisuvante muddu mogadiṁ pūrṇēndubimbakke dā :
biḍuvantellara dhairyamaṁ moleya biṁ nurgi- nōṅkalke dhīṁ

div.p:
va.adalladeyumaccariyargaccariyanoḍarcuva pocca posajavvana
daccaṭeyadorvaḷ

lg.l: siriya vilāsamaṁ śaciya sampadamaṁ ratiyondu rāgamaṁ
girijeya gāḍiyaṁ madana keḷalsuttire kēḷvenilla mai

div.p:
va.antu pāḍuvāḍuvuyyala tūkaṁ kūḍe taledūkamano
ḍarce meccuveḍeyoḷ vidūṣakaṁ nāgarikādigaḷe nimma balumeccinoḷe
nage phaḷamāgadīnīyiyara toḍeya mēlennu manēṟisidoḍāṁ
meccuvenene duṣṭanāyakariṁ baṭike ninnanākegaḷa kūrpa kōraḍigarēṟisa
luyyalāḍuveyendu nagisuttuṁ naḍeye mundondu mr̥dvīkā
lateya maṇṭapada naḍuve candrikeya campeyumavettidante sodevaṭiyada
lōveya muttina lambaṇada malaṅgu bhaṅgivaḍeda kusumadesu masū
rikeya mēle goṭṭigāyaṇiyara ṭhāyegaḷe taledūguva nevadiṁ
koḍaṅkeyoḷ palatuḍuṅkalakhiyada pasuḷedumbige kannavurada cenne
jhila makarandarasamaṁ sārcuvanteyuṁ, kendaṇadinaḷeva kandukamaṁ
kaṇḍu purju poḍare nōḍuva nevadiṁ maṇimaṇṭapakke nikāravaṭṭeya
candrōdayamaṁ sandisuvanteyuṁ, beraleḍeyoḷaḍisida kappu ravaḷuki
noḷe nagisuva rōḍagaraviḍuva nevadiṁ pariva muguḷageya muguḷḷe
ḷagiṅge takku guḍuvanteyuṁ, kōmaḷāṅguḷijāḷakaṁ meṟeye kēda

lg.l: geya galiyaṁ tīḍuva nevadiṁ seḷḷugurgaḷa baḷḷivaḷagiṅge candrakaḷeya
kaḍegaṇ nuṇṇeḷagaṁ masārisuvinaṁ beṭṭiṅgaḷiṁ jōlva pū
goḍanaṁ gella kucakke māṇikada paṭṭaṅgaṭṭu nannaṁ toda
ḷḷuḍi viṇādhvanigoyyaraṅguḍuvinaṁ kuḷḷirdaka. ja, tanvaṅgikuḷḷirdaḷaṁ. tannaṅgiyaṁ

div.p:
va.kaṇḍu nāgarikanarasaṅge tōruttu manukūlanāyakaṅgīpa
dārthaṁ neṭṭa nanubhavigaḷa nubhavanīyaṁ namma dēvanaṅgabhōgaparikarakke
dēvēndraṁ nicca nicca maṭṭu vaccaragaṇikeyaroḷuminitaccariya celvaṁ
kāṇinendu meccuttuṁ pōge mattondeḍeyoḷ vidagdhaviṭanorvaṁ
tanna tōḷoḷe baḷedu muḷiva tiḷiva sūḷetanada tōḷupallaṭamanaṟiyada
kādalaḷe tanna māḍida tappu tannaṁ nōyise tāne tiḷipalendu

lg.l: nuḍidaṁ dainyada mātanātanidireṭgaḷ mōnadiṁ mugdha kā

div.p:
va.āgaḷākeya mēludōsarise mogavaḍaṅgaḷeda madanamātaṅga
kumbhayugaḷadantirda nelemoleyaṁ kaṇḍu bharada javvanada sukhapāṭavada
kurupanīkeyoḷ kāṇalādudenutumarasaṁ keḷageḷa duṣṭanāyakaṅge
viṭanintendaṁ

va.ene vidūṣakanīdivyaliṅgasthānakke nīnumātanuṁ jaḍegaṭṭi
maḍavarāgimendu nagisuttuṁ naḍeye mattondeḍeyoḷ muni
diniyanaṁ tiḷipal keḷadiyaṁ nambade tembelarge pūmbaḷiyaṁ bale
yaṭṭuvante tanna taṅgiyane baḍiyaṭṭi taḍedu bandudaneka. ca. ja. kai. sairisalā
adakkaṁ midintendaḷ

lg.l: bīsaravāytu meyya bemariṁ phussaṇacchavika. sūra. suyya gāḍiyiṁ
sūsiduvoḷḷu ruḷ miḍidu pāyva pudaḷerde batte toṇḍevāy
kī sukumāriyaṁ kaḷupideṁka. sakhi. sakhi pōgi balilla bikkaṭā

div.p:
va.adaṁ kaṇḍīke tanna maruḷaṁ macci nuḍidoḍaṁ raccege birdu
dendarasananu kūlādigaḷoḷ nuḍiyuttuṁ naḍeye mattondeḍeyoḷ
kūrisi kūrtu kuṭilaviṭanorvaṁ muḷida nallaḷanellāteṟadiṁ tiḷipa
lāgide keḷadiyaṁ bhēdisikoṇḍoḷapugallordipiranamāke mānavati
gintendaḷ

lg.l: keḷadī nīṁ balleyentendanuvisidare bēsatte nāṁ nallanēki
nnoḷagappaṁ nīnumānuṁ suciva madananuṁ ballirāvetta balleṁ

div.p:
va.endu nuḍinuḍidu bēsakhisidoḍākeyaḷḷi baḷḷi baḷḷane
pōgi mattanintendaḷ

lg.l: muḷisaṁ mēllōliseṁ kaṇḍoḍe karakariseṁ poyoḍaṁ bayyanēneṁ
doḍadaṁ mārkoḷḷenīsāvina saviyaṟudēṁ sāladē tandu kūḍā
tananātaṅgīva muyyaṁ ninage koḍuvenēlakka pōgembuduṁ bhōṁ

div.p:
va.adaṁ kaṇḍarasaṅganukūlanāyakaṁ īpraṇayaprakārakke saha
carivaḍeva saṁvidhānaṁ sarasavādudendu meccuttuṁ pōge muṁ
dondu saudhaśāleya mattavāraṇadoḷottege kuḷḷirdoḍaneya sūpge
tanna taṅgiya bēḷāda gāḷutanamanintendaḷ

lg.l: kuruḷoḷ koṅkida bhaṅgiyaṁ savaḻi vakṣōjaṅgaḷoḷ citramaṁ
baredopputtire pacce māle muḍipiṅgollakke muṅgaige bō !
pparavaṁ muṭṭi musuṅki dantavalayaṁ taḷtordaḷ bēṭamaṁ

div.p:
va; adalladeyumolpa bojaganuṭidummaḷadinottege meyyō
ḍalāgide nettada nevadiṁ pottugaḷeva magaḷge kuṇṭaṇiyōrvaḷinteṁ
daḷ

lg.l: nettada sāriyante mole mūḍaloḍaṁ guṇavēyi lajje nā

div.p:
va.adaṁ kēḷu nāgarakanarasinoḷ munne taṅgiyaṁ cunna vāḍi
dakkana vakramege baṭike magaḷaṁ nuḍida kuṇṭaṇiya koṅkusaṅgativaḍedu
denutuṁ bare mattōrvaḷaravēṭagārti kalahadoḷirdarabojagananō
lagakkalaṅkarisi kaḷuhi cittaduttavaḷatananaṁ tanna manadannaḷappa keḷadigiṁ
tendaḷ

lg.l: rdu nitambābhāgadoḷ paṇṭisida dugulavāgirdu sarvāṅgadoḷ caṁ

div.p:
va.anuḍiganukūlanāyakaṁ dakṣiṇanāyakaṅge tannolavina celvu
manīke celvanāge nuḍidaḷendu pogaṭutti rpannegamendumillada tappanaṁ
dē māḍi nonda manada kandaṁ kaḷeyalendu sūruḷu kāḍiva kāda
laṅgullu

lg.l: toḍagūṭaṁ samasanda nammoḷage tappaṁ mālpa ninnondu bā !
ḷḷoḍadēkappudu vīṇeyuṁ paṟiye pāḍuṁ tīrdudiṁ sāladē

div.p:
va.adaṁ kēḷu vidūṣakaṁ keṭṭeninitu nuḍivākeyātanaṁ biḍade
māṇaḷene kuṭilanāyakanele chāndasa biḍuvoḍinitu suḍunuḍiyēke
tuppadolaviṅge tappu karasāṇi matte posatappu danaye ninagidu posa
tendusiruttuṁ pōge mattōrvaḷ tanna nolisi maidegedu balidu
kāḍuva viṭana kāṭamāṭaviṭambarise kūṭadoḷirdākeyintendaḷ

lg.l: nnēnenagembavol negaḻdu kūrisi bārade suṭṭa paṁ manō
jānalaninde benda vidhi peṇṇane māḍidanenna nallanaṁ

div.p:
va.āpraṇayamuggeya muggā vilāpanakke meccuttuṁ pōge
mattorvaḷ neremaneya madusūḷeya sobagiṅgabaldu tannante paḍa
paḍugi gaḍaṇakke banda haḍaṇagitti sūḷegintendaḷ

lg.l: mārmugilāḍadippudu bojaṅgara sandaṇi paṭṭi taṭṭi kā
karmada ratna bhūṣaṇada kānti taḷirtapudintu mūlanī

div.p: va.antu jakkañjariva kajjamaṁ kēḷu

va.endu viṭaṁ nāgarikanoḷ nuḍiyuttuṁ naḍeye matto
rvaḷ kāryāntarade bērnelevōda nallana pimbaḍiyoḷ pambali
sutirda bambaphaladaśanavasane

va.ākeyeraḍayiyadolavaṁ manadegoḷuttuṁ bare matto
rvaḷuduva vallabhana suḷivaṁ bīdiyoḷ kāṇṇāseyiṁ barutumirdu

lg.l: nevadiṁ kāydu kanaldu pōdiniyanaṁ kaṇmuṭṭinoḷ kaṇḍu kai

div.p:
va.mattamorvaḷ citra priyaṅge mātumātinoḷ munidu
virahaduriya seliṅgu poḍeduddīpana vastugaḷa vaiparītyakkagidu keḷadi
gintendaḷ

lg.l: madanana kūḍi tāmumenagīkege kāyda puvenna kūḍi pā
dida giḷiyenna hinde naḍepāḍida haṁsigaḷintivakke ta
kkudanusirdennanenniniyanaṁ kare nīṁ tiḷi nīṁ taḷōdari

div.p:
va.adaṁ kaṇḍu mundayiyada mugdhayendudakke naguttuṁ
naḍedu mattondu maneyoḷ

lg.l: maneyuṁ makkaḷumoppu tirpuvu basantaṁ bhāvanādante sa

div.p:
va.endoḍaneya kuṇṭaṇiyōrvaḷ tanna magaḷa sobagina
sompina paḍepāḷitanamane nuḍivuduṁ kēḷu viṭanintendaṁ—pasavō
ḍida hayada hālinidappantiruṇḍuṭṭu koṇḍu taṇida sūḷemaneyoḷallade
khēlanasukhaṁ salladene nāgarikanintendaṁ
va.adukāraṇadiṁ

va.enuttuṁ bare mattondeḍeyoḷ tanuvumaṁ maneyuma
nalaṅkarisi baravaṁ pārdidra rathāṅgasantatiyantiruḷugatiye banda
cittēśvaraṅge dārike vidārikeyādante nondintendaḷ

lg.l: tāḍene benda bāysaṟarge macci musuṅkadoḍijje kāṟaroḷ
kūḍene tōḷe kokkarike huṭṭa doḍintenagenna lēsana

div.p:
va.endu tanna kambaniya tandalindatisnēhalateyaṁ beḷeyisi
daḷ, mattondeḍeyoḷ citra vallabhanuṭida virahaparitāpadiṁ bāḍi pāḍa
ṭida gāḍikārtiyaṁ nōḍi keḷadiyar tammoḷintembar

lg.l: cāḷaṁ cāḷaṁ maruḷāḍidanaḷipaḷipaṁ kāḍuvaṁ kāḍuvaṁ hiṁ
dōḷaṁ dōḷaṁ navāmraṁ vicakilanalinījālakaṁ jālakaṁ ka

div.p: va.endavaḷiroḷorvaḷ nallanallige pōgi

va.endu tandu kūḍidaḷadaṁ dakṣiṇanāyakaṁ sāhitya sārōda
yaṅgīdūdavi jattakamaṁ nuḍidu javakamillade kūḍidaḷendu nuḍiyu
tuṁ pōge mattondu vinōdabhavanāṅgaṇadoḷ

lg.l: iniyar biccade macci bāḷge sobagiṁ sokkēṟidar bīṟde kā
mana kūrambina kōḷge suggi posavelliṅgaḷ banaṁ bandamā

div.p:
va.adaṁ kaṇḍu vidūṣakanivaḷarcaneyāḍe pīṭhamardanaṅge
noccanādudendu nagisuttaṁ pōge mattondu sūḷevaneyoḷ

va.adaṁ kaṇḍu parihāsakanarasana mundirvarirvaruṁ kāma
dēvaṅge kaleya kavaḷigedōṟidarivara jīvataminte salku mendu mai
yikki nagisi mattondeḍeyoḷ munisiṅge munisanoḍḍi kaṇṭisuva
kāmukaṅgātana keḷeyanintendaṁ

lg.l: karuṇaṁ kaimige kāmaneccuṟida kōllōl nōḍidappaḷ sakē
ḍira sōṅkiṁ maṟanādoḍaṁ tiḷivuvalliṁ kaṣṭamē mānasar

div.p:
va.ēdendu keyyaṁ piḍidetti śayyāgr̥hakke yārvarumanota
nūṅkidanitta mattondeḍeyoḷ bojaganorvaḷoḷaṁ nuḍidu
bēḷāgi kēḷivanadoḷesu paseyoḷ poraḷu pottugaḷediruḷina jonna
durivarige nittarisalārade

lg.l: ḍanamaṁ tēdesegeyda dante meṟeyuttuṁ kṣāmadoḷ taṇṇana

div.p:
va.eyde vandu bāgiloḷ nindāḍuva vaitāḷikaraṁ nagisuva
rōḍagaraṁ pogaḷḷi nāgāriyaroggaṁ nilisuttu moḷagampokku
va.aprastāvadoḷ

lg.l: dhavanaṁ pakkadoḷirda nāyaki naguttuṁ bēṟe kaṇṇitti tō
kūḍi muḻuṅkuvaḷ sakhiyaroḷ sati kūḍire ninnagītamaṁ
pāḍaloḍarci gaggarikeyoḷ jarivaḷ manamittu ninna mā

div.p:
va.endu cintisida latānta kōmaḷeyavasthāntaradiṁ decci
salendu

lg.l: musukuṁ gāḍiyumonde ninna pariyandaṁ nindu nīṁ bandeyeṁ

div.p: va.antumalladeyuṁ

lg.l: nanagēkādudu benda rūpaseva rūpiṅgintu hāṟāḍa ja
vvanamājavvanadalli kūradana bēṭaṁ bēṭadoḷ kāyda jai

div.p: va.embudumānitambini

lg.l: nalavuṁ bēṟpude māṟpu mannaṇeyanēgēḷappe bāḷemma kā

div.p: va.endu suydu baṟullu basavaṟdu mai maṟadaḷalladeyuṁ

lg.l: kuruḷaṁ koḷkoḍe koḷḷu mē muḍuhinēṟbūliṅgakkaṭā eṅgumē
beralaṁ koḷkoḍe māṇṇu mē munisaninnēnādaṟaṁ vakṣadoḷ
birudaṁ koyoḍe barkumē manege mēṇ hīnāṅgiyuṁ muṭṭalā

div.p:
va.intu paricchēdisidaḷinne gamētakkendaṟiyenendu mātaṁ mā
ṇṇu duvātanaṁ janāntikadoḷā taḷōdari bāḍida kuvaḷayakke mūḍida
candrikeyantirīkeya baravu celvanādudinniralāgadendu kaḷupidaḷittalā
dūtiya mātiṅge nāgarakādigaḷoḷarasanintendaṁ

va.endu tammoḷ nuḍiyuttuṁ naḍeye mundondu maṇi
maṇṭapakkalaṅkāravāda mattavāraṇamaṁ malaṅgi kuḷḷirdu mugdha
madhye prauḍha yemba viṭīkadambakadoḷorvaḷ tanna vallabhana mōhada
muddugeytamaṁ nenedu keladoḷirda bardegintendaḷ

lg.l: ja. puruḷiga.puruḷiya kūḍe pārivada lallege bhullisutirdeyendu maṁ

div.p:
va.mattōrvaḷ tanna kannevēṭadiṁ kūrisi kūrtu viṭana
guṇamanintendaḷ

lg.l: isiyaṁ kūrmeya kūṭadoḷ guru kaḷābhiprāyadoḷ tande tāy

div.p:
va.ene mattōrvaḷ beleveṇṇa bēṭavembudu paradhr̥tada saradante
kōḍinoḷe meṟuvudadukāraṇadiṁ

lg.l: ka. bratida.bettuva bēṭamaṁ suḍu parātiya nōmpiya gaṇḍarīva ka !
suttuva baṇṇa saṇṇamivu bēṭada kūṭada suggiyennirē

div.p:
va.āmātiṅganugatavāgi mattōrvaḷ caturanitambiniyinteṁ
daḷ

lg.l: ṇmarudina citravidde kavipaṇḍitarōduva koṅku cenna poṁ

div.p:
va.endu goṭṭiya catura cāṭuvacanaṅgaḷanellaruṁ meccu ttuṁ
bare mundondu candrakānta maṇimaṇṭapaduparimataḷada sambhōga
bhavanadoḷage

lg.l: savināññāṇisi bayya bayyuḷane bāyaṁ biṭṭu lallaisi bē
ḍuva bēḍutoḍagūḍadendu kaḍupindaṁ poyya poyeṭṭu po !
ṇmuva rōmāñcada sālavettuva taviltārkaṇḍu hammaisi hā
nīḍuva bāya bākuḷake pallaṭamāḍuva bayda bayyuḷaṁ
bēḍuva hoyda hoyke puḷakāvaḷimūḍuva gaṇḍu heṇ taḍaṁ
baḍedire kāsi beccu toḷedante bemar tiḷidēḍe pīrdu bā
yḍagido ka.voḍaṅkinantoḷege.ḍaṅkinantoḷage poṅgidoḍaṁ ga. ka. kiripallakiripollarōpariṁ

div.p:
va.āgaḷāberala korala sarada suti kūḍe rati pāḍe bājisuva
vīṇeyante kivige saviyanavaṭuvudanālisi kēḷu vidūṣakaṁ
viṭakuṭiladuṣṭaroḷīkandarpadundubhininādamādūtikaredoydalara
bojaṅganadhyavasāyavendu pacce nuḍiyuttuṁ bandondu kusuma
kōdaṇḍamaṇḍapada munde nindalli nereda viṭapēṭakadoḷ kāma
tatvarahasyamanēnānumaṁ kēḷalakku mendu neraviyoḷ berasirpina
morvaṁ tanni niyaḷaḷerdevēṭamaṁ nenedu keḷeyaṅgintendaṁ

lg.l: lduridu kanalkeyiṁ karidu kāḍade kādaḷabalme kaṇṇa nī

div.p: va.mattamorva0 garavōṭada bhōgiyintendaṁ

va.āmātaṁ mārkoṇḍu sūḷeya tōḷe toṭṭilāgi baḷeda
jāṇanintendaṁ

lg.l: bavarindicceya meccu salpu paḍe puṇṭillennadir mattamā
rpu vilāsaṁ sale sūḷe koraḷe viṭaṅgantādoḍantāpurū

div.p:
va.ene mattōrva0 meccadīyaluṁ pottaduḍiyaluṁ
balla caduraviṭanintendaṁ

lg.l: suḍuvudu suṭṭu tūruvudu tūṟida būdiya hiṭṭuguṭṭi bo
ṭṭmaḍuvudu mikkudaṁ kadaḍi kuṇṭaṇigīvudu tīvi hañcinoḷ

div.p:
va.ene mattōrva0 basanada meccu poccarāda icce kāniṁ
tendaṁ

lg.l: nere paredoḍe kīṟu poṟagikki janaṁ beḷagāgi bīdiyoḷ
nereye kukillu kūkiyidu koṇḍoḍa sāvavolārdu kūḍadē !

div.p:
va.ene mattōrvaṁ bēṭamane pāṭisi kūṭadoḷ sanda rasika
nintendaṁ

lg.l: siri celvaṁ siriyalli rūpu mige celvaṁ rūpinoḷ matte muṁ
hareyaṁ bēvina suggi pālmaneya citraṁ kāḍa candrātapaṁ

div.p:
va.ā bhinnarucivacanaṅgaḷḷi meccuttuṁ bandu mundondu
suratabhavanada purōbhāgadoḷ taṇṇuṁ kampuṁ pompuḷiyāda campa
kada campeyadoḷage

lg.l: ṭṭuva kāmakrīḍe yāmatritayada kaḍeyaṁ kāṇisittendu ratyu

div.p: va.āgaḷ nāgarakaṁ dēvaravadharisimittal

lg.l: lidarpa ka. nire kaṇḍepaḍuvakaḍaloḷ,nide kande paḍuvagaḍeyoḷ candraṁ

div.p: va.embudumarasaṁ yāminīvirāmasamayamanupalakṣisi

lg.l: lageveṭṭiṅgaḷa sompa sairisadavol bhōṅkal maraḷvandu rā

div.p: va.annegamittal

lg.l: yyane karadiṁ nimirci makarandada mumbadanaṁ teraḷḷi pa

div.p: va.anantaraṁ

lg.l: yūḍi podalte kaṇṇaniya mumbadadiṁ ponaloḷ muḻuṅki tēṁ
tanivaṇṇaṁ porebiṭṭu kuttesalṭa ka. ḷoḷḷiṁ.ḷottindōḍi nindūḍuva
navarōmāñcada kīl saḍillu toḍe ka, toḍeyoḷḷey.tōḷa maiyellameccattu ci

div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasanta santānārāma
rāmacandramunīndra prasadāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇa
kiraṇa prasannāntaḥkaraṇa kavicakravarti biruda kavi
bhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva viracitamappa
anantanātha purāṇa doḷ
kaumudīmahōtsavavarṇanaṁ
aṣṭamāśvāsaṁ

div.head: navamāśvāsaṁ
div.p:
va.antuppavaḍisi prabhātikakriyākaraṇapariṇatāntaḥkaraṇaṁ karaṇa
trayaśuddhasiddhaguru pañcakapadaprapañcasañcita saparyāścaryajāta
nāścaryagītātōdyatyamaṅgaḷasaṅgītapracuradarśitaprabhāvaṁ
prabhāvabhāsurabhaktibharanamitanarēndrasurēndramakuṭamaṇikiraṇacandraca
kitamr̥gēndrapīṭhōpakaṇṭhāśiṣṭarājyagāmaṇīyabhōgōpabhōga
sukhasaṅkathāvinōdadinirpalla

va.antu nityanirantarasukhānubhavabhōgarāgāviḷāsaparimaḷā
dhivāsitakuvaḷayaṁ kuvaḷayadaḷavilōlalōcane yarappa.yappa ratnamāḷāva
hāmahiḷege

va.antu jagattūjyamāda rājyalakṣmīsaptāṅgasaṅgatiyoḷ
harṣarasapuḷakasasyavanutkarṣaṁmāḍaluṁ kāruṇyadhārāvarṣapuṇyaghanā
ghanamanōlagisi ghanategālambanamāgalavasarambaḍedante

lg.l: dudu bisilē 3 taiḷa.... keñcalo.kaṭṭidudu sambaḷamaṁ kaḷahaṁsamāḷe me
ṭṭidudu tuḍuṅki sōge moḷeyoḷḷiḍu kuttide miñcu keccalo
nyāsade koṅki nindu kusumāñjaḷiyaṁ kuḍe muttu māṇika
ṭaṭabebe kuṇikubebe ṭa ṭa ṭa ṭa ṭa vendu mettaluṁ
keṟa keṟayi bāvi bāvi tōrdedappade darduravrajaṁ
kumadiṁ bhāvisi candanāmbugaḷa nīraṁ poydu hārītara
inanidireḍḍe kārmugila bārige biṭṭano taḷta baḷḷimiṁ
cina baleyalli sikkidano hoyva siḍilgoḷagāgi nindanō
ghanajaḷadhāreyiṁ karagi hōdano tannane kāṇenendu pa

div.p: (lalita ragaḷe)

va.antu banda varṣāgamadoḷakālakanakadhārāvarṣavarṣadhara
parvatastōmābhirāma ratnaprasāda śikhara niryōhaparyyaṅkamaṇḍaḷa
doḷirda parimugila pāḍuva baḷākada suriva karakada sūsuva tandala
suciva tambelara suttuva cādageya bittarambaḍeda viyattaḷavemba citra
śāleyalli

lg.l: gaganī citrike bālabhānukaramaṁ kaṇṇiṭṭu toydiṭṭa ba
gūḍada muṁ paredu poṇṇu soṅkida nabhama

div.p: (pr̥thvi)

va.antu nijāntaraṅgadoḷ bagedu śarīrabhōgasirvegapara
nāgi sabhābhavanakke bandu sāmrājyabhāramaṁ vijayakumāranoḷḷili
suva bageyiṁ mantri purōhitāntarvaṁśikādiparijanavanitumaṁ barisa
loḍaṁ
va.antu malladeyuṁ
va.alli

lg.l: kāgeya gūgeyoṭṭeya sr̥gālada katteya bālgaḷante me
kuḍivar kōpadoḷeyde rūpiḍe vibhaṅgajñāna ka. vairāgyadiṁ.māvairadiṁ
koyya poraḷḷi kutte koṟadikki taḍaṅgaḍidoṭṭe nettiyaṁ
poyya bullu vaitaraṇiyaṁ puge kāyduṟulōhavāri cuṁ
huyyalanikkuvaṁ koḷayi koḷḷu dimalgaḷ dikoṇḍu magguvar

div.p:
va.ā vibhaṅgajñānadiṁ jātamāda parasparōdbharita vairaṅgaḷo
ḷḷuṇḍakōparvā daṇḍakhaṇḍanaṅgaḷalladeyuṁ karāḷarappa taḷārūkṣa
rākṣasarpiḍidu

lg.l: desaḍesavāgi sīṭṭu niḍunālageyaṁ kaṭadelvu sīṟe sī
ṭisi kaṭavāygaḷaṁ husiyoḷāda phaḷaṁ savinōḍidendu gā
suḍu suḍu nārakara nameva samayada sāvaṁ
ḍuvinaṁ kōṭale kōṭi kūḍe sahajaṁ śārīrajaṁ mānasō
tire kuttaṁ page muccu nirdhanate dainyaṁ yājñe bhūpāla ta
bēḍara kōlge vāgurige śastrake kūḷigeraḷa nāyakū
vudu karmaṁ baḍisalke karmaripuvaṁ gellondu balkeyduvā
vudo saddarśanadīkṣe dīkṣeya phalaṁ kaivalyamiṁ pēṟadā
taḍeyadu javvanaṁ padavi nilladu kollade matte kuttavō
paruṣame muṭṭe karbuname ninna padāmbujasēvakarge saṁ
para paramārthavēdavida vēdavida ka. ga. satpalā.dhr̥vasāyatatparā

div.p: va.bandusamucitapradēśadoḷḷondu

va.antu vinamitōttamāṅgaruṁ vinayabharākuñcitāṅgaru
māgi

va.antu bhinnavisi lōkāntikadēvaruṁ tadbhāsakke sandarattal
avadhiyinabhavana sakṣigaḷāgi

va.antu caturnikāyanākinikāyasamētamāsākētapurakke
vandaramaneyaṁ pokku sabhābhavanamanaḷaṅkarisirda bhuvanatrayābharaṇana
pādapīṭhadoḷ kedaruva pārijātaprasūnapratānakānata kirīṭamaṇigaṇa
cchavigaḷiṁ kadambadaḷadabambalaṁ paḍedu pariniṣkramaṇamaṅgaḷōdyōga
manēkamukhadiṁ pogaṭṭu tanna besadiṁ sameda puṇyajanēśvarana puṇya
puñjada pañjaradantirdabhiṣavaṇamaṇḍapakke bhuvanamaṇṭapamāṇikyakaḷaśanaṁ
tāne kaigoṭṭu bijayaṅgeysi maṅgaḷadravyanavyānulēpamālāparikara
parītakarasarasiruheyaranappareseyaraṁ majjanapīṭhadikkeladoḷḷilisi vr̥ṁ
dārakadundubhigabhīramaṅgaḷācāracārunirghōṣaṁ mārutamārga
maṁ mūvaḷasu vaḷase
pr̥thvi.

lg.l: canaṁ neṟeye paṭṭamaṁ neredu kaṭṭi boṭṭiṭṭaraṁ

div.p: va.āsamayadoḷ

lg.l: ggaḷeyaṁ māḍi jagadvaraṁ tiḷisidaṁ tāvellaruṁ māḍuṟaṁ

div.p:
va.āgaḷāḍaṅguragaḷemba riggavaṇiya paṟigaggaḷisuva nagaranarta
kiyara citradantirettuva tōraṇada kaṭṭuva guḍiya mōḷiguva baddavaṇada
beḷaguva kannaḍiya tīvuva kaḷaśada bhāvisuva baṇṇavurada sūsuva saura
bhyada pāsuva māleya pāḍuva māṅgaḷikada āḍuva nartanada bittari
suva bīdigaḷa kattarisuva raṅgavaliya nartisuva vaitāḷikara kīrtisuva
vandigaḷa pūraisuva śaṅkhada sūḷesuva bhērigaḷa sūḷḷaḍeva kahaḷegaḷa
kōḷāhaḷameseye madilamāḷigegaḷa māṭakūṭada śālegaḷoḷ kūḍe
nindu nōḍal nereda purajanada sambhramaṅgaḷināpurada kṣōbhamananta
nāthaprāmrājyaprakarakkamanantavijayapaṭṭabaddhānukramakkaṁ sakkasama
nāgire tekkane tīvi tuṭuṅkāḍutirdudittal
va.tadanantaraṁ

lg.l: puḷakaṁ kaimige nōḍi nōḍi maganaṁ harṣāśruviṁ sēseyaṁ

div.p: va.āgaḷ
(taraḷa vr̥tta)
va.adalladeyuṁ
va.adalladeyuṁ

lg.l: ṇṇigeya mugilgaḷaṁ kedaṟe tacchibikāśikharaṁ paḷañce mē

div.p: va.adalladeyuṁ
va.ānandanada madhyapradēśadoḷ

lg.l: ttina māṇikyada pacceyaccavaḷagiṁ beccante celvāytu dē

div.p:
va.āmaṇḍapada makaratōraṇaddārōpakaṇṭhadoḷḷondu dēva
rājaṁ rājādhirājanindicidu manujadivijayakṣarākṣasavānavyantarānaṁ
takōṭidundubhidhyānaṁ bānameseye baḷḷaḷabaḷeye bandupokku
va.antu pūrvābhimukhanāgi kuḷḷirdu

va.āgaḷa puḷōmajātāsamētamindrāṇīvr̥ndamanituṁnīrā
janabhājanavyagrahastapravāḷeyarāgi suttiṟidu nindire māṅgalya
vastusaṅgatahastarāgi dēvēndranoḍane taḷire saudharmēndranumā
śānēndranuṁ maṅgaḷamaṇṭapadubhayadvāradoḷ peṟagaḷoḷagaṇa kaḷa
kaḷamaṁ nivārisuttumire

lg.l: damardire sauṣṭhavaṁ nr̥pati pañcapadāñcita pañcamuṣṭi paṁ

div.p: va.adalladeyuṁ

lg.l: dmada maṟudumbiyante sēri nīḍida nuṇṇereyemba tōḷge daṁ
tada baḷeyantiral suḷidu suttuva beḷḷuḷiyemba candrabiṁ

div.p:
va.ābāhyābhyantaravemba tirōdhānaṁ tegedu paramapāvanatapa
saruṇiya vivāhōtsavamanānta paramapuruṣanaṁ nivāḷisuvarcisuva
poḍemaḍuva pogaḷva sakaḷajanada jayajayadhyānaṁ divijānakadhvāna
doḍanoḍanatgaḷagamāge

lg.l: manadanurāgamaṁ paḍeva maṅgaḷalakṣmiya nōḷpa kaṇṇi mō
tanatanagiṭṭu toṭṭu talesutti karaṁ maṇidattananta ji

div.p:
va.ā paramēśvarana caraṇasarasiruhamaṁ bhaktibharadinarcisi
pūjisi pogaldu poḍevaṭnāḍi pāḍi paripuṣṭāntaraṅganāgi

lg.l: nayadiṁ rājagr̥hakke tāṁ kaḷisi pōdaṁ dēvadēvēśanaṁ

div.p: va.tadanantaraṁ

va.antu pūrvanivēditapuṇyāśramāraṇyadiṁ taḷardu ayō
dhyāmukhanāgi barpalli
va.ā praviṣṭapurīmadhyavīdhībhāgadoḷ

va.antu sāgārāgāravīdhikāvaḷayaṁ sanāthamāge naḍeta
rpāgaḷ

va.ā vinēyajanajaṅgamapārijātaṁ pārijātanandanavembante
poḷeva tōraṇada miḷirva keṅguḍiya kaḷaśamukurastabakada phaḷakusuma
visarada maṅgaḷagānada dundubhidhvanitakōkiḷāḷāpada mahōtsavama
ccarivaḍeye ceccaramidirgoṇḍu

lg.l: mr̥dupadapaṅkajaṁ naḍedu kempu maralnu nijāruṇāṁśu pā
sida dugulakke bāsarada māsaramaṁ kuḍe banda yōgirū

div.p:
va.antu gurubhaktipūrvakaṁ vandisi nilludendu nilisi nija
gr̥hāntarvanaśuddhapradēśamadhyāsitakalyāṇapīṭhadoḷ sakalakalyāṇabhāja
nanaṁ bijayaṅgeysi

va.antu nirantaritaparamatapaścaraṇadhātragātrasandhāraṇapāraṇā
nantaraṁ

va.antu pañcāścaryaṁ negaḍe pōlanitumātanaṁ pogade
tannunīndravr̥ndārakaṁ sādhusaṅghasamētaṁ sahētukavanakke bijayaṁ
geyyāgaḷ

va.endu gadgadībhūtēpsitakaṇṭhakandaḷanuṁ harṣōtkarṣita
bāṣpavāsapūranuṁ puḷakakaḷikōtkaḷitatanulatādaṇḍanumāgi vanajava
dhanada ruciyaṁ macci biḍalārada maṟuyañceyante kāruṇyajaladhiya
gauravamanāviśākhanr̥pālanagalalārade kaḷisuttuṁ kaḷiya pōgi tadā
nugrahamaṁ māṟalārade kaṇmalaramāleyane baṭigaḷisi bandanittal

lg.l: pramanaṁ ga. cittā.cintānivr̥ttapraśamitakaraṇaṁ nindu kaiyikkidaṁ sa

div.p: va.antu māsaikamātraprakalpitapratimāyōganiratanirdalli
va.adalladeyuṁ

va.matta māmunīndracandranemba himavanmahīdharadinogeda śāṁ
tarasamaruttaraṅgiṇīpravāhaṁ sthāvarajaṅgamaṅgaḷoḷanaṅgavikārave
rasvabhāva ka. ja. dāvapāvaka.dāvapātakanirasanamanoḍarcaloḍane

lg.l: śarabhaṁ kēsarigaḷge kēsari karīndraṅgaḷge kāḍāne bē
ccari sāraṅgamr̥gakke citrakamr̥gaṁ pāviṅge pāvalli muṁ

div.p: va.antumalladeyuṁ

lg.l: mati nālkūha yavagrahaṁ negaṭṭi vāyaṁ dhāraṇaṁ liṅgajaṁ

div.p:
va.antu samanisida caturvidhāgamaśuddhiyoḷaṣṭavidhar̥ddhiyoḷa
madhikr̥tanāgi baleyaṁ
va.antu taḷardu vihārisuvalli
va.antu

va.antu mārgapravartanārthaṁ chadmasthakālamaneraḍuvarṣa0
baraṁ dharmavihāraṁ maunavratadiṁ kaṭipi sakalakēvalabōdhalōbhada
mūladhanamaṁ maḍagideḍege barpante mahāvratahētuvappa sahētuka
vanakke maguṭṭu bandu dhavaḷavimaḷamappa pippaḷāvanīruhada mūla
doḷśuddhaśilātaḷapratibagdhamenipa śuddhōpalōparimataḷadoḷ baddha
palyaṅkāsananuṁ pūrvābhimukhanumāgi

va.antakṣīṇayōgalakṣitamappa samarujusaṁsthānakke parama
padabhāvadiṁ nūlegedante niyugevaḍeda bāhyasāmagriyoḷ vyagranāgi
samyakjñānadarśanasiddhaparamēṣṭhiguṇāṣṭakaniviṣṭacētasaṁ caturvidha
mappa dharmadhyānadoḷatyantamappa parōkṣasūkṣmapadārthaṅgaḷumaṁ
sarvajñabhāṣitajñānabaladiṁ niścayisuvājñāvicayadoḷaṁ bhēdābhēda
ratnatrayabhāvanābaladiṁ svaparakarmanirmūḷanacinteyoḷesaguva
upāyavicayadoḷaṁ śuddhacaitanyarūpaṁ sāṁsārikasukhaduḥkha
svarūpanalla nanādikarmavaśadiṁ narakādiduḥkhakkaṁ puṇyōdayadiṁ
dēvādisukhakkaṁ bhājanamakku emba palacintanavipākavicayadoḷa
manuprēkṣegaḷoḷ lōkasvarūpamumaṁ cintisuva saṁsthānavicaya
doḷaṁ niścintacittanāgi

va.anantaraṁ viśramaṇādiyoḷ nistaraṅganāgi mattaṁ pūrva
kramadinapravr̥ttamapūrvamanivr̥ttavemba karaṇatritayadiṁ mithyātvaṁ
samyagmithyātvaṁ samyakprakr̥tigaḷemba darśanamōhanīyaṁ berasu

va.mattamanantaraṁ cāritramōhōdayakkaṁ jñānavairāgya
sampattigamitarētarātikramaṇamantarmuhūrtadoḷasadaḷamappanaṁ
pramattāpramattaparāvartanasahasraṅgaḷaṁ kaṭipi śuddhōpayōgayō
gyateyiṁ kṣapakaśrēṇiprayōgādyapravr̥ttakaraṇadiṁ pariṇatavāda pramatta
guṇasthānadoḷ sthitibandhāpasaraṇasahasraṅgeydu pūrvakaraṇakṣapaka
nāgi pr̥thaktvavitarkavicāradcattvāriṁśadbhēda prathamaśukladhyānādhī
namānasavāyuḥkarmamuṭivinaṁ jñānāvaraṇādisaptavidhakarmaṅgaḷaṁ
sthityanubhāgakāṇḍakaghātakaguṇaśrēṇinirjharādigaḷananukramadiṁ kiḍi
suttuṁ pratisamayamanantaguṇaprabhāvabhāsuraviśōdhipariṇāmadinani
vr̥ttakaraṇakṣapakatvaṁ kaḷedu pūrvōkta sthitikāṇḍakādikriyegaḷinaṁ
tarmuhūrtadoḷ narakatiryaggatitappayōgyānupūrvivikaḷatraya
sthānagr̥ddhitritayātapōdyōtasthāvarasādhāraṇaikēndriyasūkṣmaṁ
gaḷemba ṣōḍaśaprakr̥tigaḷḷe nirayamanoḍarci baṭiyamantarmuhū
rtadoḷapratyākhyānapratyākhyānabhēdakriyeyiṁ krōdhamānamāyā
lōbhaṅgaḷeṇṭumaṁ niṣkaṇṭakaṁ māḍidimbalikke tatpariṇāmaviśēṣakke

va.mattamanivr̥ttakaraṇadiṁ antarmuhūrtadoḷ pratisamaya
pravartamānasañjjaḷanacatuṣyānubhāgamanapūrvaspardhakaṁmāḍi baṭi
yamucitakr̥ṣṭikriyeyiṁ pūrvaspardhakānubhāgamananantaguṇahānirū
padiṁ kundisuttuṁ dvādaśakr̥ṣṭikriyāntarmuhūrtadiṁ catuṣkaṣā
yaṅgaḷa samastānubhāgamaṁ kr̥ṣṭipraviṣṭaṁmāḍi samanantaraṁ pratyēkatri
vidhakrōdhamānamāyāsañjjaḷanakr̥ṣṭigaḷananukramadiṁ bēṟe bēṟe
kiḍisi tatkaṣāyatrayamaṁ layakke salisi lōbhasañjjaḷanamananantaraṁ
prathamakr̥ṣṭigatānubhāgadiṁ bhaṅgisi baṭiyameraḍaneya kr̥ṣṭigatānu
bhāgamaṁ bhaṅgisuttuṁ bādarasāmparāyakr̥ṣṭyanubhāgamananantaguṇa
hānirūpadiṁ kundisi sūkṣmasāmparāyakr̥ṣṭigaḷaṁ māḍuttumanta
rmuhūrtadiṁ bādaralōbhasañjjaḷanamaṁ kiḍisi sāmaikadōpasthā
panāśuddhipariṇāmasamaktvananivr̥takaraṇalakṣaṇakaraṇakṣapakaguṇasthānamaṁ
dāṇṭi samanantaraṁ

va.samanantaraṁ karaṇalabdhiya paramōtkarṣadiṁ vītarāgadvē
ṣayathākhyātacāritrakṣīṇakaṣāyaguṇasthānasaṁskr̥tānēkatvavitarkavicā
rākhyānadhyānapariṇatanaparimitapradēśanirjharādikriyākaḷāpaṁ nidrā
nidrāpracalāpracalegaḷanucitakatipayasamayadinātmadvicayasamayu
doḷkiḍisi

va.antu ghāticatuṣṭayavemba kaṭṭale kiṭṭale kīṭindaleyāgi
niravaśēṣaṁ paḍeyaloḍaṁ

lg.l: jare rōgaṁ tr̥ṣe nidre mr̥tyu jananaṁ sṭēdaṁ madaṁ cinte bhī
ti rati glānate vismayaṁ kṣudhe viṣādaṁ mōhanaṁ dvēṣa rā

div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasanta santānārāma
rāmacandramunīndra prasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇa
kiraṇa prasannāntaḥkaraṇa kavicakravarti biruda kavi
bhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva viracitamappa
anantanāthapurāṇadoḷ
kēvalajñānakalyāṇavarṇanaṁ
navamāśvāsaṁ

div.head: daśamāśvāsaṁ

lg.l: jvaḷakōṭyarkaprabhājāḷa ga, mane. mene kaḍedu kaṇṇiṭṭu nuṇṇiñcinoḷ ka
vaḷayaṁ tēṅkāḍi ga. kampa. paṅkapraśamana paramajñānahīnasvarūpaṁ
tiḷidudu nīrgaḷante gaganaṁ gaganasthaḷadante dhātri ni

div.p:
va.antu sakaḷavimaḷabōdhasvarūpaṁ satpathadoḷudayaṅgeydi
rdudaṁ sudharmaṅgavadhibōdhākṣēpavikṣēpaṁ pratyakṣaṁmāḍaloḍamādi
śāmukhakkeṟabaḍiyaṁ naḍedu poḍevaṭṭu nindu dhanādhyakṣanaṁ samavasa
raṇaviracanege nirūpisi

lg.l: śatapatraṁ śatakōṭi kūḍi bare paulōmīsamētaṁ śata
parapuva tōḷaḷettida namērulatāntada māle nīḷda paṁ
karuhada māleyaṁ miguva puṣpakamāle tagultu puṣpamaṁ

div.p:
va.antu bandu samavasaraṇamaṇṭapakkanatidūradondu gaga
namaṇḍalakke vicitravarṇa saṅkīrṇavitānapaṭamanavaṭayisidante nindu
kalpā marēndra sandōhamikkeladoḷaṁ kikkiṟidugidu kūḍe kūḍe
ghūrṇisuva pañcamahāśabda kōḷāhaḷamanuttambhitahasta pallavadiṁ nilisi
divijavallabhaṁ nijavallabhege bhuvanavallabhana paramapariṣadbaḷayamaṁ tōṟuva
lgayindamintendaṁ

lg.l: harinīḷōdbhuṭṭitaṁ vartuḷataḷa ka. gaḷaliṁ. miḷeyiṁ prōmadondudaisā
ṇi ka. miḷayaṁ, dalalliṁ dharmacakrasthaḷi baṟike mahāmaṇḍapaṁ madhyabandhaṁ

div.label: ragaḷe
div.p:
va.āgandhakuṭilakṣmiya muttina mēkhaleyante taḷataḷisi
poḷeva viyattaḷaspaṭikakōṭāvaḷaya madanamaṇḍaḷāyatta harinmaṇimaṁ
ḍapacatuṣkadoḷ bahirantarvedikādhiṣṭhitanaisarpapāṇḍukapadma piṅgaḷa
kāḷa mahākāḷa māṇavaka śaṅkha sarvaratnavemba navanidhigaḷuma
vaḍeyeḍeyoḷeḍeguḍada guḍiya kannaḍiya supratiṣṭhakada vimaḷacama
rada dhavaḷātapatrada śr̥ṅgāraghaṭada maṅgaḷakaḷaśada maṇitāḷavr̥ntada
pesaroḷesevaṣṭa maṅgaḷaṅgaḷuṁ navaratna racitaddārōpaṭhyadhiṣṭhita gadādaṁ
ḍacakrapāśaphaḷakakalitabhujaparikalpita kalpacāmaraprāti ka. ghāta. hāragauravamu
manāścaryamumanaḷaṅkegoḷisidudalliṁ pōge

va.ādhūpastūpabhūmikāvaḷayadiṁ pōṟage pūrvōktavidhāna
gōpurāṣṭa maṅgaḷanavanidhivēdikādvārapāḷakanāṭyamaṇḍapadhūpaghaṭī
paṭaḷadiṁ meṟedu mūlabaddha siddha pratimāprasiddhaṅgaḷappa mandārapāri
jātaharicandanakalpavr̥kṣasantānavemba siddārthapārthivaṅgaḷiṁ sārtha
kamāda daśavidhakalpa vr̥kṣōdyānavaḷayadoḷage

va.ākalpavr̥kṣāvaniya poṟasuttinoḷ sutti yida ponna madila
beḷḷiya gōpuraṅgaḷa yakṣakumāradvārapālana pāḷiverasu navanidhimaṁ
gaḷāṣṭakadavaṣṭambhameseye niṣṭaptakāñcanādhiṣṭhitakumbhastambhōjr̥mbhi
taṅgaḷuṁ khagēndramr̥gēndragajēndragavēndracandracandra kacchatrada
marāḷamāḷikāśatapatra citri tadaśavidhānacīnāñcaḷacumbitāmbaramukhaṁ
gaḷumappa viṁśatyuttaratricatussahasramukhyadhvajaṅgarondakke
nūleṇṭāge baḷasida nālkulakke yumaluvattu sāsiradāru nūra
vattu dhvajaṅgaḷinēkayōjana vistāravāda vaijayantikāsantānabhūmi
yindoḷage

va.ākētanavrātabhūtaḷada poṟage jātarūpavēdikāṣṭamaṅgaḷa
navanidhisidhānayakṣakumārarakṣitāraśākhāntarāḷarūpyagōpuracatuṣka
doḷaṁ āgōpurapratibaddha ṣōḍaśapramitanāṭyamaṇḍapabhūmikātritaya

doḷage bēḍuvēḍuva bhāvarasada siriya sarivaṟeya kuḍimiñcina kuḍi
gaḷante nartisuva mūvatte rbardēvanartakiyaroḷaṁ anartakiyara baḷḷa
guruḷa bambaloḷ tumbiya bambalaṁ taḍambugise taḷtakarpōkavanada
muguḷta campakavanada kāyta cūtavanada paṇṇa kadaḷīvanada pūdu
vinoḷ kāḷagurudhūpadhūmastōmadiṁ nīladaḷataṅgaḷiṁ māle
goḷḷuva dhūpaghaṭapaṭaladiṁ rūpupaḍedaṣṭamaṅgaḷamahāprātihārya
pr̥tanaparyāścaryaṅgaḷa caityaṅgaḷa pūjigaṇaṁ niṟugevaḍeda śākhā
sahasraṅgaḷoḷaṁ maṅgaḷōtsavamanappukeydu

va.ācaityavr̥kṣāvaḷiya pūṟage dauvārikajyōtiramaramāṇikya
makuṭaśōbhāntumēḷadiṁ rajatamayamāgiyuṁ mahārajatanimirataṁ
gaḷante kampu sompupaḍedaṣṭamaṅgaḷanavanidhisanāthaṅgaḷappa bāgilvāḍaṁ
gaḷemba mogaṅguḍigaḷeseva maṅgaḷalakṣmiya kaḷḷambaḷḷivaḍida naḷatōḷgaḷa
netti baḷasida dīpapadma rāgada prākāradoḷage māvambalaṅgida mallikāla
teya pūgataru kaigoṭṭa nāgalateya kēsaraṁ mēlmaisida vāsantikāla
teya mātuluṅgantaḷta jātilateya sandaṇisida kundalateya mēlmai
sida māḷatīlateya pampakamāda campakalateya piñjarībhavisida karavīrala
teya muguḷisida vakuḷalateya bāḷkompaḍe baḷasuviḷasamāda ratnara
citakyatakācalaṅgaḷoḷ pāḍuvāḍuva suranarakinnarakhēcarāṅganeyara
viḷāsanakyāvāsavāgi

lg.l: pudida latāvanāpaḷiya muttina baṇṇada tumbi nīlava
ṇṇada giḷiviṇḍu māṇikada baṇṇada kanneḍavakki pacceva
ṇṇada kaḷahaṁse cittisidarō binadakkene tōṟi cōdyamaṁ

div.p:
va.ālatāvīdhiyinattaṇa suttinoḷirda yōjanavistāravāgi
vēdikāgōpuradvārapāḷamaṅgaḷāṣṭakanavanidhividhānaṅgaḷiṁ munnīra
varṇada kannaḍigaḷante meṟedu kāruṇyaratnākaradayārasapūraṁ mēre
gaṭṭi maṇipratānasōpānaśōbheyinubhayataṭaṁ subhagamāge tīvi
tiḷidu nindudenisi mugidaṟiyada tāmaregaḷinaga ṟiyada jakkavakkigaḷi
nalarkegundada nīḷanīrējadinoṟante meṟava

lg.l: gaḷa mēloṭṭida yakṣakardamada paṅkaṁ nūṅki tēṅkāḍi paṁ

div.p:
va.akhātikāvaḷayadindittal pōṟamuttinoḷaṁ modala gandha
kuṭīcaturdvārābhimukharatna gōpuracatuṣṭayadiṁ poṟamaṭṭu dhūḷi
śāḷada kaḍeya maṇimāḍambaramēkagavyūtisavyāsamumubhayapakṣavistā
ritacandrakāntabhittivistāramumantarvidhimāḷikāpradēśōcitakṣullaka
dvārābhirāmamuvāda nālkuṁ bīdigaḷādalegaḷa bāgilpāḍadā
ḷavakkadoḷ kikkiṟidugida maṇitōraṇanitāntikadoḷ caturasra hēma
bhūmikātritayaprāsādavaprākāraṅgaḷoḷamāprākāraprathamavēdi
kācaturantarbhāgadoḷ digaṅganeyara jaḷakēḷīviḷāsakkeṁ vivikṣujana
karaṇacaraṇaprakṣāḷanakka makṣīṇalakṣyamāgi maṇimayasōpāna sandhānita
mappa nande nandōttare modalāda padināyiṟaṁ sarōvaraṅgaḷoḷamoppa
manappukeydu

va.āmānastambhaṅgaḷirkelada vīdhībhittibhāgādhyantaradoḷardha
yōjanavistāradoḷaṁ saptabhūmasaudhasāmānyānēkaratna kadambaruci
gaḷinogeda vāsavaśarāsanaṁ dhūḷīśāḷamaṁ bāsaṇisi ninda caityamaṁ
diraṅgaḷa nityaniratiśayabhōgaṅgaḷoḷ paramēśvarana mahimātiśayamaṁ
gaḷaṅgaḷoḷaṁ muktakaṁ kulakaṁ kōśaṁ saṅghātavemba racanāvaicitrya
citrāyatanavaidaṇḍikaprabandhabandhurapadyabandhadoḷamuṣkaḷike cūrṇi
latike khaṇḍaṁ vr̥ttagandhi citravemba gadyabandhadoḷaṁ tadyugaḷa sammiḷita
rasabhāvasampaccampūkr̥tiyoḷamōdi pogaṭṭi suranarakhēcaravinēya
vr̥ndaparamānandakamanēka saṅkīrṇarāgaṅgaḷiniḷādiprabaddha śuddha mā
rgadoḷaṁ dhruvādigītajātamēḷāpakada sūkṣma kramada dēsīmārga
doḷaṁ mārgatrayānugatavāgi pāḍi parasuva kinna rakimpuruṣagaṁ
dharvagīrvāṇabhavyanatyōtsakarge layakavāgi līleyaṁ taḷedu

lg.l: nya ga. bidiṁ. dadindāḍuva pāḍuvaggaḷikeyoḷ cūḍāmaṇījyōtseyo

div.p:
va!! ācaityāvanīvallabheya mēlgoṇḍakārōhaṇadante nayana
kautukārōhaṇavāda dhūḷiśāḷamanaḷaṅkarisi navaratna racitadvāraśākhā
nubadda jyōtīndradvārikanikāyachāyāvacchanna caturdiśāstra sanna
lakṣmīlēpanaviḷāsamaṁ taḷedu

lg.l: lla gaḍaṁ kṣuttr̥ṣe jāti bhīti mr̥ti vēgaṁ nidre śōkaṁ karaṁ

div.p:
va.endu manōnayanavallabheya manōnayanaṅgaḷa sabhāraṅga
doḷāsuṁ pokkuṁ baredu paramānandarasa ka. doḷē. dōkuḷiyāḍe bēṟu
vēṟe varṇisi tōṟi nijakirīṭamāṇikyaśōṇāṁśupaṭalaṁ paṭṭa

vardhanagajada niṭilapaṭṭadoḷ sindurambaḍeye gandhakuṭīratnakaḷa
śaṅgaḷa vanatanāguttumeyvandādhūḷiśāḷada mūḍaṇa bāgilvāḍada
mundaṇa prāṅgaṇadoḷavatāritābhramūvallabhavāgi vimānayānavāha
naṅgaḷaniṟide kalpajēndravr̥ndaṁ berasindrāṇīsamūhasamētaṁ pokku
divijēndranaindrīdiśāvīdhiviḍidu naḍetarpāgaḷ

lg.l: prasarada kānti kārmugila mē ka. ja. mēle. geḷanēsaṟa doregēṁ bisi

div.p:
va.anteyē vandu gaganaspaṭikaprākārakkaḷaṅkāravāda haritaka
hiraṇmayadvāragōpuramaṇṭapadinoḷapokku

lg.l: vigegaḷa māleyaṁ makuṭaśōṇamaṇi prabhe maukti kācchara

div.p:
va.siṁhapīṭhōpāntamaṇikuṭṭi malakṣmige sarvāṅgāliṅgitava
nittu harṣōtkarṣapuḷakajāḷakaṁ munnēṟu balekameṭṭu samucitapra
dēśadondu kiñcidavanatakōṭīrabhāranuṁ mukuḷitakarasarō
januṁ vikasitādharapāṇipallavanumāgi

lg.l: jaya jaya jaya paramapuruṣa jaya jaya jaya du

div.p: va.endanēkaprakāradiṁ stutisi baṭikkaṁ

lg.l: kaḷaśaṁ śukike vartulaṁ paṭalakaṁ vaistāḷi nīrājanaṁ
gaḷavastu prakarakkaṟdeṁ śaciya keyyuṁ kaṇṇu moṟondana

div.p:
va.antanēkapūjāvidhānadoḷaṁ vākrūjāviśēṣadoḷamārā
dhisi gaṇakōpadoḷagaṇa viśēṣakaranāgirda jayanāthagaṇadharadēvasama
kṣadoḷirdu paramadharmābhisēvābhimukhanāgaloḍamanantajiddallabhana
vadanamaṇḍalavemba himavadvāraśikharadiṁ divyabhāṣānimiṣataraṅgiṇīppa
vāhaṁ tālusaṅghaṭṭa namumadharasaṅghaṭṭanamuvilladeyuṁ dūrāsannaṁ
gaḷoḷavyakta malladeyuṁ gambhīramadhuraśravyaguṇānupamāḷaṅkr̥ti sallade
yuṁ dēvabhāṣādisakaladēśabhāṣātmakamappudalunardha māgadhiyoḷ
nilladeyuṁ yathāprakāramintavatarisidudu । jīvapudgaladharmā
dharmākāśavemba pañcāstikāyaṅgaḷumanīyayuṁ kāladravyambera
sāyida paḍḍravyaṅgaḷumaṁ jīvamajīvamāsravabandhasaṁvarenirjare
mōkṣavemba sapta tattvaṅgamaṁ īēlu tattvaṁ puṇyapāpaṅgaḷemberaḍuṁ
padārthaṅgaḷberasombhattāda navapadārthaṅgaḷumanoḷakoṇḍu sapta
rajju pramitasamacaturasramūlapradēśamuṁ caturdaśarajjūtsēdhamuṁ
saptaraṣṭu pramāṇa dakṣiṇōttarāyāmamuṁ pūrva paścimakramahīnaika
rajju parimāṇamadhyabhāgamumanupūrvavistāritapañcarajju saṅkhyānta
rbhāgamumanukramahīyamānyakaraṣṭu samāsitāgrabhāgamumāmūla
cūḷanairantaryataru sārōpamitairajju pramitacaturasra trasanāḷānta
ramuṁ ghanōdadhi ghananiḷaya tanuvāta nāmavāyutrayāvēṣṭi tamā
girpudīlōkasyarūpaṁ । īlōkamadhyadoḷanēkadvīpakūpāravarṣa
dharaparvatamandaramahīdharapūrvāparavidēhabharatairāvatakarmabhōga
bhūmi samākīrṇa svayambhūramaṇasāgarāvadhiyāgirpa madhyamalō
kaṁ । īmartyalōkadiṁ jyōtirlōkamberasu mēgaṇa bhāgadoḷa
saudharmēśānasanattu māramāhēndra brahmōttaralāntavakāpiṣṭaśukra
mahāśukraśatārasahasrārānataprāṇatāraṇācyutavemba padinālu
lpaṅkagaḷoḷamombhattuṁ ḍraivēyakaṅgaḷoḷamombhattu manudēśavimā
naṅgaḷoḷamaydu manuttaregaḷoḷaṁ sarvārthasiddhiyoḷumuttarōtta
rasukhāyurādhikyamaṁ taḷedirpudu dēvalōkamata māmadhyalōka
diṁ keḷage madhyabhavanavemba nāgalōkadinatta ratna prabhe śarkaraprabhe śaṅkha
prabhe dhūmaprabhe tamaprabhe mahātamaprabhegaḷuṁ bhēdadinadarōttara
duḥkhāyuṣyakāyōcchēdaṅgaḷaṁ taḷedirpudu naralōkamāmūliyiṁ
lōkaṅgaḷaṁ toṭṭane toḷaldu tiṭṭane tiriva narakatiryagmanuṣyadēvagati
gaḷge puṇyapāpāstravaṅgaḷe kāraṇaṁ । avayoḷ samyagdarśana jñāna cāri
travemba ratna trayabījaprabhūtamappēkādaśaguṇasthānasamanvitasāgāra
dharmadoḷaṁ bāhyābhyantarabhēdabhinna dvādaśavidhatapōmārgavartiya
ppanagāradharmadoḷaṁ negaṭṭi cāritrapuṇyāsravakāraṇaṁ kāmakrōdha
lōbhādigaḷiṁ jñānāvaraṇādr̥ṣṭa vidhavāgiyumanēkavidhadinudayi
suva karmaparipākaṁ pāpāsravakāraṇamivākarmaṅgaḷeraḍarke jīvaṁ
tāne kartr̥vuṁ bhōktr̥vumappa ratna trayasākalyamubhayakarmaṅgaḷoḷaṁ
nirmūlanakke kāraṇavāgi karmanirmūlaname mōkṣamakṣayamanaṁ
tamavyābādhamatīndriyamanindriyamapunarbhavaṁ siddhaparamēṣṭhi niṣṭhita
nityāvāsaṁ bhavyajanaparamōpādē yavendu saṅkṣēpadiṁ nirūpisa
loḍaṁ sakalagaṇasamūhaṁ paramānurāgarasadiṁ tannoḷ taḷtaḷedu
nalidu paramapuruṣananārādhisuttumirdudāgaḷ
va.annegamittal

“ ōṁ hrīṁ namōrhatēnantatīrthakr̥tēnantabhōdhā
yānantadarśanasaukhyōnna tavīryāya

hrīṁ namōbhagavatē
yanantanāmme namōnantajinanāthāya ”
div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasantasantānārāma rāmacandra
munīndra prasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇakiraṇa prasannāntaḥkaraṇa
kavicakravartibiruda kavibhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva
viracitamappa anantanāthapurāṇadoḷ
samavasaraṇavarṇanaṁ
daśamāśvāsaṁ
sampūrṇaṁ

div.head: ēkādaśāśvāsaṁ
div.p:
va.citralateyemba matta marāḷagamaneyaṁ kaṇḍu keyyaṁ piḍidu
nilisi taddōpuramaṇḍapaprathamabhūmikāratnavēdikeya muttina matta
vāraṇamunirvaruṁ nemmi kuḷirdu

lg.l: kēḷele taṅgi citralate nīṁ peṟagirdapeyendu ninna nāṁ
tāḷayadoḷoṟaḷalla bisi kāṇade ga. kāṇine. ka. kāṟa. pēḻpenendu kēḷdudaṁ

div.p:
va.embudu mācitralate karṇasubhagamāda vr̥ttakamaṁ kēḷalabhi
mukhiyappuduṁ madanapatākeyintu pēḻpaḷendu samavasaraṇamaṇḍala
memba sanmārgamaṇḍaḷadoḷudisida candramaṇḍaḷadante maṇḍaḷisi
poḷeva dhavaḷakāyakāntikaumudīprabhege suprabheyaṁ teraḷḷi suprabha
nemba nālkaneya baladēvaṁ bandu dēvara dēvanananēkārcanegaḷinda
rcisi poḍevaṭṭu jayanāthagaṇadhararoḷ tanna pūrvajanmavr̥ttakamaṁ
berasu nijānujātaṁ trikhaṇḍamaṇḍaḷādhīśvaraṁ caturdaśavāsudēvaneni
sida paramapuruṣōttamana vr̥ttakamaṁ besagoḷaloḍanāgaṇadharādhī
śvararintendu besasidaradentendoḍe

lg.l: ggada bhavanāmarālayada meysiriyendoḍe nōḍa nāḍa haṁ
baḷasida nandanaṅgaḷa pasurppina paṇge agirda kelaṁ
pagegaṁ śakrana nandanakke miguguṁ tampumaṁ sompumaṁ
jvarāghātade kuttesaḷḷusidu haṁsa ga. ca. vr̥ṁsa. vyānadiṁ sōṅke jo
pina siri bēḻvēḻ maṇimāḍada tintiṇi bēḻvēḻ naṁ
ttarisida bīdi vīdhigaḷa kādalegoppuva maṇḍapaṁ manō
bharatananaḷḷi bāhubali tuḷḷi maraḷḷida pūgoḷaṁ bhujā
ṭvirisida taṇṇuṭiyeṟeye māḍida taṅgadināḍe sōlpa na
gaḷa taḷirjompadoḷu suṭṭu mellane mettane moggehiggi pū
gaḷa posagampinalli sucidimmane kammane tīḍi bēṭado
prasaraṁ muktāphalaṁ tāmene sogayise kaigeydaḷaṁ tāḷi koṇḍaṁ
purvina koṅku kaṇmalara kānti kadampina teḷpu sālkudā
jayavadhu bāhupūrakada mēle malaṅgida tōḷaḷaṁ manaḥ

div.p:
va.antu sakalarājyāṅgalakṣmiyoḷaṁ vinōdaviḷāsaṁ dēsevaḍe
vinamiṣṭaviṣayakāmasukhānubhavavibhūtiyindamirdondu divasaṁ

lg.l: majamaṁ bandeṟatakkimbiḍuva hiḍiva mārkoḷḷa kaikoḷḷa mādya
ṭṭida kāyduṁ ghaṭṭisuttirppinamibhapatiyaṁ nīḍe biṭṭikke keyyoḷ
ggaḷikeya naṭṭu sōrva madadhāreya meysiri kārahārigi

div.p:
va.antēṟu meṟava vāhaḷīvinōdāvasaradoḷorvaṁ pūrva
paricataprasannākāraṁ sudarśananemboṁ bandu suradhanuparidhipaḷi
tasudhāsūtibimbāyita phullākārajhallarīsamullasita sitātapatraṁ, karaka
rōttāḷadōḷāyamānakalāpaguluñcchaṁ stambhitōttaraṅgakhurapuṭa
parāgapaṭalaṁ.
gharmajalaluḷitagaṇḍamaṇḍalatāṇḍavīkaḻtanāgakuṁ
ḍaḷaphaṇāmaṇḍaḷanurasthaḷaskūlatārahāragabhastivistāritakañcukāñcaḷaṁ,
paritānataṟpayāṅgarakṣakadaṇḍaphaḷagargharīnirghōṣasaṁvalvuvaladyā
rakīsamārūḍhaneyde vandumavatīrṇa turaṅganāge tanna baravindavakāśa
māytuttuṁ mattagajada biduvanappaḷisuttuṁ ninda vasuṣēṇamahārā
jaṅge darśanōpāyanamanittu poḍevaṭṭu nindu dēvaradēvana sahōda
raṁ sahapāṁsukrīḍānubandhasaṅgatabandhu makaragrāhapuravarādhīśvaraṁ
caṇḍaśāsanadēvaṁ dēvaraṁ paladevasamagallirdu nenedu nōḍalbaru
ttumavasaramanuṟiyalenna naṭṭidanembudumatiprītiyiṁ vistāritavilō
cananāgi bēgamāgaḷe barevēḍendātmanarmasacivamberasātanaṁ kaṭipi
baḷasi ninda gandhasindhūraghaṭāpaṭavanikkelakkedegeda pasāyitaratuḷuṁ
gabaḷanumāsthānīkr̥tarājasutasamājanumāgi sindāgaḷ

va.antu baraloḍamirvaruṁ vāhanaṅgaḷaniḷidu rōmāñca
sañcayaṁ toṭṭaṅgigaḷa taṭṭurci percida muyyaneḍe poṭṭenoḍeye
parasparāliṅganaṅgeydu tatsamayasamucitabhāṣaṇasambhāvanānantaraṁ
vasuṣēṇamahārājaṁ tanna paṭṭada madavēdaṇḍamaṁ caṇḍaśāsanananē
ṟisi bēṟondu bhadragajamaṁ tānēṟi mahāvibhūtiverasoḍagoṇḍu
bandu
div.label: mallikāmāle
div.p:
va.antu nirvikalpamuṁ nirantaritamumāda sauhārdadoḷa
ppaikasadanada sahapaṅktibhōjanada sahaviḷāsakrīḍitada samayaṅgaḷoḷage
vasuṣēṇanaṅgane sunandādēviya bhāvambaḍeda kusumakōdaṇḍana
vaśīkaraṇakāṇḍaṁ kīñmaseyiṭṭu guṟugattirdi baṇṇaviṭṭante kaṇṇatava
kamaṁ kaḍegōḍivariyisuva rūpiṅganurūpavāgi tiḷakitamāda madana
mattagajaduttaradēseyante cittamaṁ tottaṟaduṭidēyiñjavvanakkaḷaṁ
kāravāgi kaimāḍi meṟeva kāmadēvana karavāḷante kaṇnoḷ poḷede
rdeyoḷuḷḷi koḷḷubeḷḷugoḷisuva viḷāsadoḷaṁ viḷāsakke dayaṁ
baḍedu manmathacakravartiya sammōhanaśaktiyante bhāvakara bageya
baykeyanageyetti sūṟegoḷḷe kaḷakaḷāprauḍhiyoḷaṁ durātmakanappa
caṇḍaśāsanana kaṇmalar kavidu kavvaregoṇḍu maṇḍaḷisi baḷasi sōlakkā
lambavaṁ paḍeverdegādadavaṟaluṁ tanuviṅge tāpamumanoḍane baḷeye
vaḷeye

lg.l: rpeḷeyaḷa tōḷa mūlada pogarmaṇibandhada celvu kōmalāṁ
guḷigaḷa koṅku kaṇṇe kuḍe kautukamaṁ bhramegoṇḍu kāmukaṁ

div.p: va.adalladeyuṁ

lg.l: tugaḷaṁ nāsikegāytaṟavuṭida sūṟoḷ saurabhaṁ svādu nā

div.p:
va.antu kantusantāpakke pakkāgi kukkuḷagudidurkadoḷa
goḷage bēva hr̥dayamaṁ padavaḍisalāgade tanage bīḍundāṇamāda
māḍada perigaṇa nandanavanada mākandabhūruhada mandacchāyeyoḷḷiṟi
suva kuḍuveya bijjaṇigeyoḷaṁ pāsuva bāḷapravāḷataḷataḷadoḷaṁ
sūsuvālinīrtuntuyoḷaṁ pūsuva candanasthāsakadoḷaṁ, vasanta
samayānurūpachadmaśiśirōpacāracārucāturatnaṁ meṟeye mamma
lamaruguttumirda tannavasthāntaramanaṟidu maṟeyadante besagoṇḍa
sudarśananemba keḷeyaṅgintendaṁ

lg.l: nuḍiyadoḍele keḷeya ninage benda manaṁ saṁ
bhrame pattittu manakke kaṇteṟapi biṭṭantēnumaṁ kāṇavaṁ

div.p:
va.endu tanna hr̥dayakavāṭamaṁ teṭṭandeṟedattaḷagamādu
ttuṇḍavēṭamaṁ bayaloḷikki bāyaḷida nijapatiya nuḍige sudarśana
nendaṁ mēregaṭṭida balekāra sairaṇiyumorevōgadiravu ; pariva manakke
saggamillaṁ ; nōḍuva kaṇṇaḷeḍege ka. ṭṭeyilla. ṭṭillamadalladeyuṁ

lg.l: doḍe talehōgiyuṁ basidu bīḷade sairisaralte kāmukar

div.p:
va.ādoḍēnādudānitambiniyoḷ namma manōrathasiddhigava
kāśamuṇṭadenteyennoḍe

lg.l: lliya kāryāntaramēṁ prayāṇadinaminnendentu tāṁ petta taṁ

div.p:
va.embudumarasanākr̥tyōpacāramanolavententu kaikoḷa
lbandapudu

lg.l: bhāvahamāgadendoḍe sakhaṁ nr̥pa nīmbare māṇba jōḍeyar

div.p:
va.adalladeyumindu dēva nīnumātanumārōgisi kaighaṭṭi
goḷutumēkamarāḷatūḷataṟpāsanadoḷ parasparaṁ mukhasambhāṣaṇā
viśēṣadinirdalli ninna peṟage kuḷirdenna kaṇ teṟipādudāsarōjanayane
bhōjanaśālāpavarakamaṇibhittiracitaśītāṁśukāntavātāyanāntarvē
diprasāritamasūrikāgradoḷapāci tanna samācīnapavanaparimāyamā
naniṭilāvalagnakuṭilakuntaḷamanoyyanoyyanōsarisuva kabaridhāriṇi
ghanastanamaṁ malaṅgi sahacarnicayadoḍane bāhyōpacāracāru
vacanadarahasanakarataḷatāḍanādivinōdaviḷāsābhinaya ja. yana. doḷirdu

va.endāke tanna vallabhaṅgabhinavapuruṣasaṅgōṣṭhi samanisi nijā
tmavallabhana sukhānubhavakrīḍegeḍevaḍeyade siḍimiḍigoḷuttirda bhāvamu
māvinayamadāḷiyaṁ mattige pattisuvante nuḍidu manada piśācakke
vacanaracanādhūpamaṁ tōṟi virahavikāramaṁ keḷarci ninnoḷākeyaṁ
kūḍuvupāyamanīgaḷe māḍidapenendu pōgi bacikamādhūrtanāḍu
ttumirdanitta virahārthaṁ bāḍuttumirdanalladeyuṁ

lg.l: ca. tyā. ḷḷārmukamambudaṁ tiḷipadaṅgigeyakkane kōla miñcu tāṁ

div.p:
va.bandu keyyoḷirdalagina kōlumaṁ kaṭṭidalagumaṁ dūrāṁ
taradoḷ kīḻtāḷana keyge nīḍuttumeytandu poḍevaṭṭu nindu

lg.l: muttaṁ ka. muttuṁ. pombuliya tovalanāneya kombaṁ

div.p:
va.dēva mattamāṁsamaduṭiye paḍahada piḷukuṭiye koḷambeya
kūkambada kōḍambeya muḍigeya tāṇaṅgaḷoḷ mēdu meykerci
sovaḍiṅge sōltu kūḍade kavaltu mēdu taṇidu koṭakiṭṭāḍuva
mr̥gaṅgaḷoḷindu patnisida hariṇana gōriya harṣada haravasada bhāva
prapañcamaṁ bhāvakara ballahane bandu nōḍalvēḻkumene vasuṣēṇa
vasumatī pati sakhana mukhamaṁ nōḍaloḍamātaṁ nōḍalakkuṁ bija
yaṅgeyyumendalliṁ taḷardu

lg.l: berasu vanāntadoḷeṟeya tōpina ka. ja. sōppina. sōhina nīrabeṇṭeyu
biriderde biṭṭa bāyalarva nāsike pattida gōṇu sutti ka

div.p: va.adaṁ kaṇḍu caṇḍaśāsananantargatadoḷintendaṁ

lg.l: ṇṇarigaḷḷēṟi śambarāri śabaraṁ pullambu kellambu ma
nereyalberadu gōri ca. pā. sāyadenavēḍīnōve sāvallavē

div.p:
va.āvinōdamaṁ nīḍuṁ nōḍi pogaṭṭu pōpudumarasana
rasiverasu bōnamanīnandanavanakke baravēḍendu sūpāytaranarama
nege kaṭipi suva poḷeva pullegaḷa baṭiviḍidu kāpugāḍinoḷ sōhina
bēṇṭeya binadadinīrvara rathamuṁ bēḻvēḻeyadalli caṇḍaśāsanaṁ vasu
pēṇanarasi barpa baṭṭeyattale sārdukoṇḍirppinaṁ parimitāṅgara
kṣakaparīteyuṁ paridhāvatpratipayacēṭikāpurōbhāgeyuṁ dōlādaṁ
ḍikōbhayabhāgasambhāṣitasahacarīyugaḷeyuvāgi nijavallabhanaṭṭida
baṭigebaruttumirda sunandādēviyaṁ kaṇḍu

va.endu pēḻve kathāntaradoḷātaṅgātaḷōdariyoḍambaṭṭaṁ
taḷegettu citralateyintendaḷ

va.antu piḍidoyyāgaḷuragaṁ piḍidante bedaṟi pāvu piḍidaṁ
tirodaṟi kaḍujara pattidantu kaḷavaḷisi ṭhakku pattidante matigeṭṭu siḍil
poḍedante hammadambōgi sunandeyāgiyuvasu nande kiṟidānuṁ
bēgadiṁ baṭikke kāmakāṇḍakhaṇḍitahr̥dayaṁ caṇḍaśāsanaṁ viśvāsa
ghātakaṁ kātarateyiṁ tannaṁ piḍidudanaṟidu

lg.l: ṇanr̥pa hā nr̥pa nīṟanendabale bāybiṭṭattu huyyalvidaḷ
munisuṇṭādoḍe muṭṭi mūdalisi balpiṁ ninna bāḷātanā
ḷtanamuṁ gaṇḍara pinde kaḷḷudaridē strībāleyaṁ būte pā

div.p:
va.endanēkaprakārapraḷāpākrandanaṁ syandanavēgadiṁ dūraṁ
sārappa sāraṁ dūramāgi pōtappāgaḷaḷiye suramyaviṣayada kaḍeya
kāpiṅge vasuṣēṇanirisida hesara sāvantaṁ siṁhacūḍaṁ tanna pūbala
poṟavola nandanōpāntada garuḍiyoḷage palakelambar valagennaṇaṁ
gaḷoḍane kāmana parvatadante māracitrabhittiyoḷ piḍiyuttumirda
kaḍugali kēḷdu naraturagabaḷada neramanollade seraginoḷallade beraginoḷa
sallade keyya palageyoḷaṁ kaṭṭida kaṭhāradoḷaṁ piḍida kūrasiyoḷame
ysi paridu hariṇiyaṁ piḍiduyya tarakṣuvinante taruṇiyaṁ piḍiduyya
caṇḍaśāsananaṁ dūradoḷkaṇḍu gajaṟi gharjisi

lg.l: gadirennaṁ kaṇḍu bennaṁ kuḍuvare subhaṭarsiṁhacūḍaṅge māṟo

div.p:
va.endu muṭṭi mūdalisi kaṭṭidirgevandu meṭṭi taṟuṁ
bida siṁhacūḍanaṁ sūtadvitayanāgi pōguttuṁ kaṇḍu tēraṁ nilisi
sārathiyaṁ vārijavadanege kāpuvēṭṭu kiṟbāḷoḷamatta paradoḷamava
nītaḷakke laṅghisi caṇḍaśāsananintendaṁ

lg.l: ṟāneya kaiyiḍida karbbanāṁ piḍidavaḷēṁ ka. ga. ḷaṁ.

div.p: va.enda nuḍige kaḷa ga. vaḷisi. kaḷisi nakku siṁhacūḍanintendaṁ

va.pādaradoḷḷuṭṭi kaḷavinoḷḷattaticāradarasutanaṁ ga. santa. vyabhi
cāradoḷīgideyadentene
va.enaloḍaṁ caṇḍaśāsananintendaṁ

va.endorva rorvaraṁ mūdalisi nuḍiyuttumirvaruṁ
bhūmānadaḷaviyoḷ pariyalanugeyāgaḷa
va.āgaḷoḍavandu nōṭpa nōṭakar tammoḷintendar
va.itta sunande nijāntargatadoḷintendaḷ

lg.l: baligeyeṁ nimagendu maikoragi suykega kaṇṇiṭṭu kō

div.p: va.tatsamayadoḷ siṁhacūḍaṁ
va.endavaṣṭambhameseye

lg.l: vēḷeyi ka. ga. yaṁ. nurki sūsidudu toṭṭukabillavu tārakāḷigaḷ
pārise kaṇḍa bhūraṇade rūvisidaṁ poyya kāḷavaṭṭadiṁ

div.p: va.anantaraṁ

lg.l: baladoḷottida maṇḍe cammaṭige kaivīṇaṁ beḍaṅgāge mai
yalagambettire bāhu pōragade poldaṁ bhūpa ga. bhūpampoydanā. nāvīranaṁ

div.p:
va.antu poydu rathakke pāydu sārathiya cōdanāvēgadiṁ
gāḷige gaṟimūḍidante manakke maḍavogedante muhūrtamātradi
neydi tanna durgamaṁ pokkanannegamittal

va.bandu varūthadindiḷidu bhōjanaśāḷinikāyamānapratāna
sampullamallikāmaṇḍapada munde nindu

va.antu śōkarasame rūpugoṇḍante barpa nijāgramahiṣī
parijanamaṁ dūradoḷkaṇḍidēnendaticikitacittanuṁ vissuritavilōca
nanumuddagdhabhrūlatāmūlanumuttānitakarapatākanumāguttumire
yire

lg.l: hā lalitāṅgi hā kusumakōmaḷe hā kaḷahaṁsayāne hā

div.p:
va.endu bāyaṭidaṟuttuṁ bandu munnaḍiyoḷeḍeduṁ puḍi
yoḷporaḷva viḷāsinīsamūhadoḷage rārājitaratnapādukagrāhiṇi
yappa bāḷakiyadorvaḷ dēvaraṭṭida baṭege dēviyarbaruttumire
caṇḍaśāsanaṁ kaṇḍededu piḍidu kaiseṟeviḍidu bandikāṟanante koṇḍu
pōdaṁ

va.antu parāmarśitahr̥dayanāda nr̥pāḷanaṁ narmasacivariṁ
tendare

va.ā pratibōdhanavacanaṁ vallabhaviyōgavaiklabyavaṟkasupa
kōpavyāḷapratyutthāpanadaṇḍamāge dharādhināthanintendaṁ

lg.l: peṇḍati koḷḷaṭṭu maguḻde ja. pugade. puguvene pōlaṁ

div.p: va.endeṟagi naḍeyuttavaḷisida samayadoḷ

lg.l: garanādaṁ gaḍa māri hokka maneyoḷōrvara gaḍāḷōcamēṁ
beragēṁ bembalamēṁ svarādibalamēṁ nīṁ pēḷvudēṁ kēḷḷudēṁ

div.p:
va.endu mundanārayyade pindaṁ ka. sā. pārade munde ninda
nijasyandanamanēṟi suṭṭure masagiṭṭurigoṇḍanāvyatikaradoḷ

lg.l: llaṭisi taḍaṁ taḍambariye puyyala gāvaḷi keyyaniṭṭudī
tōṟisida pāṅge kiṟtale kiṟindaleyādudu kūḍe paṭṭaṇaṁ

div.p: va.ā kōḷāhaḷakke

va.antu banda caturaṅgappa tanāsamūhasahitaṁ kr̥tabhujabala
pratāpanapratihatālēpanadīkr̥tābhiṣēṇaṁ vasuṣēṇaṁ sāmantalakṣmisi
mantanenipaṁ siṁhacūḍaṅge bīḍundāṇavāda māṇikyapuramaneyēva
rpāgaḷ poḍeva vīravaṟeya piḍiva birudina kāḷeya suttiṟda
muttina taḷeya talege mundaleyāgi leṅkarkuḍuva siḍidaleya saha
gamanasamutsukateyaṁ kaiviḍise kaiguḍuva kaidubarpa kaiviḍida
peṇḍira taṇḍada naḍuve potta ponnapariyāṇadoḷage jōḷavāṭiya
nirvahaṇada nibbaṇakke bīrasiri potta poṅgaḷasadante taḷataḷisi tōrpa
pandaleyaṁ kaṇḍu nindu nōḍāgaḷ

lg.l: muridaṟakkida gaḍḍamīse muḍikaṭṭaṁ taṟḷa kembaṭṭe ka
sphuritaṁ kaimige bhūtaḷakke parivēṣaṅgoṇḍu bīṟtinda bhā
ṭige keyyāmpaḷe vēḷe ga. paḷevēre. pāḷivenasuṁ muyyāmpa sāmantaraṁ

div.p:
va.antu pottu banda vīraṁ vīrapuruṣana śirōmburuha
maṁ dhāriṇīpatige nivāḷisi nindu vanitāharaṇavārteyaṁ sūcisi
baṭiyamintendaṁ
va.antu sāmantasāmājasiṁhaṁ siṁhacūḍaṁ

lg.l: kādida kāḷegaṁ javana jatta kulakke samānavādudē
nādoḍamēṁ barduṅki page pōda baṭikke vr̥thānuvādami

div.p:
va.embudumarasaṁ nijāntaḥkaraṇakhēdakkaṁ vīraśāsanapravā
dakkaṁ mūdaleyantirda taleyaṁ nōḍi nīḍumodavidalaṁ samuci
tōpacāraṁ vacanakāruṇyaprasādapradānaprasaṅgadiṁ santarjisuttu
mire
va.ā saṁrambhadoḷ

lg.l: paraveṇṇaṁ tandanō tandano pesargiḍe permāriyaṁ namma durga
kkarasaṁ sēnāsamagraṁ nijagali vasuṣēṇaṁ vadhūvihvalaṁ da
padadhūḷīśāḷadiṁ pūṭṭudu parikhe madilgeṭṭu gaṭṭittu puttē
dudettaṁ gōpuraṁ kattale kavidu biḍalveṟadu pattittu kaṇṇā
ṇade durgaṁ kādaluṁ kaimaṇidudanitu vaikalyadoḷunne kaṇḍiṁ
tidu bīḍundāṇavendottida paḍevaḷariṁ mutti biṭṭuttu sainyaṁ

div.p:
va.antu mūvaḷasuvaḷasi bīḍaṁ biṭṭu marudivasaṁ laggeya
deseyadivasa sadarasidaramumaṁ jantradoḍavaṇigaḷumaṁ bhūmā
namumaṁ puguva poṟamaḍuva nīrakaṇḍiya kuduregaṇḍiya teṟapu
gaḷumaṁ vasuṣēṇaṁ baḷasi nōḍuttuṁ, barpannamāgaḷēṟisida timi
roḷumiṭṭa tilakadoḷaṁ, kaṭṭida deṇḍeyoḷaṁ, arcisida kottaḷa
doḷaṁ arcisidaṭṭaḷeyoḷaṁ, ettida patākeyoḷaṁ, suttida bēvina
deṇḍeyoḷaṁ seṟegeyda sakhiyoḷaṁ, poyisida gāliyoḷaṁ, nikhisida '
basiyoḷaṁ, pūsida ḍeṅkaṇiyoḷaṁ, guḍisida guṇḍinoḷaṁ, paṭṭida
sāramāriyoḷaṁ, bāsaṇisida pāvinoḷaṁ, purida maṇaloḷaṁ, pūṇi
sida gāṇadoḷaṁ, bircida bērkeyoḷaṁ, bayyāḍuva kahaḷeyoḷaṁ,
poydu bobbiriva paṟeyoḷaṁ, teneyaṁ taṟḷa parigeyoḷaṁ, mone
yaṁ pūṇisida kontadoḷaṁ, kaigeydu kaṭṭāsuramāge maseda javana
dāḍeyante masagida rakkasara māḍadante nōḍalaridenisida makaramukha
dāḍāyaggadaggaḷikeyaṁ kaṇḍu kaḍumuḷidu

lg.l: ccaṇi sārcundole vīrasētu naḍe sārambaddaraṁ gegge ḍeṁ
kaṇi gummaṁ paḍi ka. gōpe. gōṇṭeyemba bahukōṭāyantrasāmagri tiṁ

div.p:
va.antu sūcchaisuva nissāḷabhērīḍhakkāmr̥daṅgakōḷāhaḷa
mettipottu tandiṭipududenisi guḍaviḍañcitapipīlikājāladante mutti
musuṟi patte puñce kōṭeya kottaḷadāriya jeṭṭigaroḷ
śastrāśastriyuṁ, khaḍgākhaḍgiyuṁ, daṇḍādaṇḍiyuṁ, kacākaciyu
māgi taḷḷiyava vasuṣēṇanr̥pana vīrabhaṭakōṭeya laggeyaggaḷikeyō
ḷagebilasiyaḍugeyantiraṭṭaḷeyoḍedu, baṇajigana baḷakeyante kottaḷaṁ
baṟidāgi, bulla baḍagoṇḍiyantirāḷōriyaṟdu, kaḍugoyyalāda
keyyante tenemugidu, bīsaravāda rāśiyante pulimogaṅgeṭṭu
kaṭṭugoṇḍu taṭṭuttiṟuva kaṭṭāyada kaḍugaligaḷellamaṇmaṇi nindu
mummaḷiyāge pōytu pōytu durgaminnēnendoḷagellameṟga
sarakugaṭṭi poragellamey guḍigaṭṭi sīreyaṁ bīsi bobbiḍākhe
toṭṭane kaṇḍu

va.antu kaikoṇḍu pottetti poyya kūrvāḷa beḷagina
korbisasakadoḷmusuṟi muttida mārtaleyemba kattale kūḍe kiṟtale
kiṟindaleyāge poṅgumoḷaguṁ kīḷaṭṭiyanteseva beṭṭaṅge baḷegavani
kkida bīṟta kaṇḍigaḷaṁ peṇada pēraṭṭeyoṭṭiliṁ murccimatta patti bhitti
garamottaṁ biḍe uriveṇṇeyoḷaṁ muriduruḷeyuṁ uriva maṇaloḷ
siḍimiḍigoṇḍu suruḷeyuṁ, kaṇiya kallorale ḍeṅkaṇiyāgiyuṁ,
sāramāriya poyoḷōraṇikegeḍeyuṁ, tettisida gāḷadoḷettida
pāpeyanteḷaleyuṁ, kuttida kontadoḷ kōla suṇṭageyante
sāliṭṭu bīḍeyuṁ mēldādi nindu pōgade gaṟugaṭṭi ninda ripu
vīradurgamāriya mēlalaganūli tūgāḍutirda puṇṇa uṇṇaṁ
gaḷiṁ pūta muttada pūvumoraḍiyantirdaṭṭaḷegaḷoḷage nindaṭṭaḷegaḷi
nogeva nettara suṭṭuregaḷiṁ bēsageyuripattida beṭṭadantirdudu kottaḷa
doḷottina teneya sandigaḷoḷ sandaṇisi nēlva vīrabhaṭakuṇapaṅgaḷiṁ
peṇida permeṟṟeyaṁ kaṟuva viḷayajaḷadharadoḍḍinante doḍḍigoṇḍi
rdudu

lg.l: adanāgaḷkaṇḍu kaṇṇinduri bare poge purvindamurveṟe bhōṅka
ttida kontaṁ daṇḍegoṇḍaḍḍaṇamire vasuṣēṇaṁ bharaṅgeyduduṁ pō
dudu pottiṁ kāliḍuttale kadaḍidudendāpta raḍḍesi nindar

div.p:
va.āgaḷeraḍuṁ paḍegaḷa pāratūryaṁ moḷage peṟi tegeyaloḍaṁ
vasuṣēṇaṁ bandu nijanivēśitaskandhāvāramaṁ pokkanitya caṇḍaśāsanaṁ
maṇḍaḷisi piḍida kaidīvigeya beḷaginoḷ toṭṭa gaddigeya garuḍa
vakkada kavacada navaratnakiraṇaṅgaḷa kittakaravāḷabāytāreyoḷ baḷḷi
goṇḍu miḷisi poḷeyeyuṁ, kaṭṭida kaṭhārada baddigeya toṅgal
degedu bigideṟpa bālagacceya viḷasada seṟgaṁ seḷedaḷḷiyaṟiyeyuṁ onde
kemmoḷikkideraḍu kaṅkaṇada jhaṇajhaṇatkāraṁ jaḍiva bāḷa kuṇiva
koṅkiṅgge kiṅkiṇīravamanaḷaṅkegoḷisiyumōduva rāyavāḍadugūḍi
suva māṅgaḷikada capparisuva paḍiyara nelananugūḍisuva paḍavaḷara
tanna bīramaṁ mannisi pogaṟte kaivārigaḷāḍambaragaḷumbamāge sunaṁ
deyaṁ tandu seṟeyiṭṭa maṇimāḍakke bandu
va.āgaḷ

lg.l: ī padyavu ka. pustakadalli illa. bidiyemba madagajaṁ nr̥pa

div.p:
va.antu sārdu tannoḍavandu bāgiloḷ ninda parijana
mumaṁ kelabaladoḷirda pasāyitarumaṁ pariharisi ka. ja. vinayakr̥takōpacāra. kr̥takavinayōpa
cārameseye caṇḍaśāsanaṁ sunandādēvigintendaṁ

lg.l: lmeyanīṁ mannisu kāmi kaṇṇiṟivanaltāṁ gaṇḍudoḷenna rā

div.p: va.antu kanalvonalva sairisalāgide

lg.l: meṟevāgaḷ nuḍi nāḷe nīnenage māḍalvēḻpe satkāramaṁ

div.p:
va.endu beṭṭaveṭṭane baydu biṭṭu birdidaru nuḍida sunaṁ
deya nuḍige caṇḍaśāsananēvaisi muḷiyade lajjeyiṁ caḷiyade matta
mintendaṁ

lg.l: tphaḷamaṁ tōṟuva bāḷeyāgadiru pātivratyadiṁ batti bā

div.p:
va.embudumātaṅge mātaṁ tappinamuttaraṅguḍuttiralēkeyeṁ
dākeyintendaḷ

lg.l: bhāvanegeyyarē satiyarēṁ gaḍa vīrana tōḷa bāḷumaṁ
nāvida bāḷumaṁ samane pattipa sāṇiyo maddujasrajaṁ

div.p:
va.embudumākuṭilanākeyoḷ teṟapugāṇade muḷidu māṇade
mattanintendaṁ

lg.l: biḍenāṁ nīṁ saye sāve nalladuṭiyiṁ nīnollaḍēnolladi

div.p: va.endu tanniṭipanaḍare cāḷisi nuḍidu pōguttuṁ

lg.l: paricita nīṁ taḷōdarige meyyaḷiyiṁ manamaṁ toḍaṅke nāṁ
trara vanitājanaṁ tōṟidu tōḷmudibāḷmudiyāgi bēva da

div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasanta santānārāma
rāmacandramunīndra prasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇa
kiraṇa prasannāntaḥkaraṇa kavicakravarti biruda kavi
bhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva viracitamappa
anantanātha purāṇadoḷ
puruṣōttamakathāvatāraṁ
ēkādaśāśvāsaṁ
sampūrṇaṁ.

div.head: dvādaśāśvāsaṁ
div.p: va.antu nēsarmūḍaloḍaṁ munna munne mūḍirda virahaparitāpaṁ tīradeyumētaṟayoḷamātaḷōdariyanoḍambaḍisalmāṟadeyumākitavaṁ tanna kaitavadoḷ

va.ā vyatikaramaṁ kaṇḍu namma rasaniruḷinakaliyakāḷegadoḷ muttida bīḍaṁ tottaḷaduṭidu pageya pandale keydenandu dinnēninnēnendu kōṭeyoḷage janaṁ kōṭiteṟadiṁ nāṭakaṁ nalidu bobbiyuttire sunandādēviyirda seṟevanege tāne vandu

lg.l: ḍisidaṁ ka. māyāviparyaya. māyāvi patiya māyada śiravaṁ

div.p: va.antu tandiṭipida śiramumaṁ kaḷḷuṟiyida vallabhana maṇimakuṭa kēyūramaṇḍaḷādīpanamaṇḍanamumaṁ pēruradoḷōrante meṟevatōramuttina hāramumaṁ kāṇaloḍaṁ
va.āgaḷāvyatikaramaṁ kaṇḍaticakitahr̥dayanumākuḷitavilōkanumāgi

lg.l: beragindindidanintu māḍe maraṇaṁ mūḍittu hō bendenā
nuridennandidenendu bandu bharadiṁ taḷpaise taḷḷāntu ta

div.p: va.antu mūrchiyindeccattu beccane suydu bedebede bendu nondu nindisi koṇḍu māṇade

lg.l: nōḍi kanallu bāytunidu mōnadinēkele dēvi nimmanaṁ

div.p: va.endu bāyalidu paḍeyisi basamaṟidasuvōṇiyāgi manamanaṟidu kaḷavaḷisi

va.endu tanna lakṣmībhavanamenisuvuparimaṇḍapamane citrakke māḍi sunandādēviyuṁ tānumēkāsanadoḷuḷḷardu rāṇiyavāsada peṇḍavāsada bhāṣeya leṅkara bhāratikanikaradōlagada kēḷīviḷāsamaṁ keḷage taguḷḷida hutavahajvālākalāpamaṁ meccidante mūrchekoḷḷinamoḍanaṭiyalparicchēdisida kulasvāmiyavasānasamayamāge

lg.l: lōdipa gāhe pāḍe padamaṁ posamāvina honna paccamaṁ

div.p: va.adalladeyuṁ
taḍugeyanāyḍu koṇḍuṭidavaṁ sakhiyargiravēṟe bandhugaḷoḍardire mōhamaṁ biḍisuvāśritargādeḍaraṁ kaṟulṭi bī ।

lg.l: ḍoḍisuva ponna māṇikada bāyinamaṁ samakaṭṭuvetti baṁ

va.āvāraṇada tōrahastamānupūrvisthūḷamumābhīḷamumatipralambamumāge simbegoṇḍu nakhamukhadoḷ kuppaḷisi raudrarasamaṁ kaṟuva kāra mugiloḍḍu kālūṟidantirpudu. mattamadu karṇatāḷaṅgaḷ jāḷapravāhamāda madajaḷada kadaḍanaḍigaḍigappaḷisi karpu masagi deseyanaḷurva kempēḍemba keṇḍada koṇḍaṅgaḷaṁ biḍade priyanaṟidudanadaṟapana

priyanappa ninna rājyō
dayadoḷ peṟaroḍave nanage nōḷpudasahyaṁ ॥
ī padyavu ka. pratiyallimātra ide.

lg.l: rpudu. mattamadu karṇacamarada jhalliyante jallenoḷḷi dhāregedalu

vādada kāgninoḷollanenaltu kallane kanalku. santāpakke sairisade
himakaramaṇḍalakke keyyanetti bercida hariṇaṁ mattēṁ pāydukoṇḍō
ḍidoḍe koḷḷappi suydu suyida sīkarāsāradiṁ mañju pañjarisi

div.p: va.endu dūtana mātiṅge nītiratnākaraṁ dōṣagarbhīkr̥tadarahasitavadananuṁ kiñcidāndōḷitamastakanumāguttu mārgalintendaṁ

lg.l: ḍida sāmaṁ bhēdamuṁ kūḍida beragu karaprādhr̥tacchāyeyiṁ tō
ṟida dānaṁ mantrigaḷḷide nuḍivara mātu nimmōjeyiṁ me

div.p:
va.endu baṭikke lēkhamuṁ pārvadamanabhajjana gāhayantirelōdisidadeyuṁ śōdhisadeyumannegamātanaṁ bīḍiṅge kaḷupiyonda
mukundana vacanadiṁ kanakapātraprahitatāmbūlapraśastahastanāda sandhi vigrahiya keyyaṁ nūṅkuttu mātanintendaṁ

lg.l: maccaradāyamaṁ maṟedu kaidugaḷaṁ toṟeduṭṭu toṭṭa pe
baccisi pottu gūḍiḍuva gubbigaḷantire bāgilalli pu

div.p: va.endu baṭikke sōmaprabhana mogamaṁ nōḍi

lg.l: ḍigegaṁ nīṁ besakeytu maṇḍaḷikanādre kēḍugālakke tā

div.p: va.endu tannāḷana bhujabalapratāpalēpamane mundiṭṭu daṇḍamane gaṇḍugedayida dūtana mātiṅge muḷisiṁ baḍiphalanoḷapāytu negeva jaḷadharagabhīradhīradhyānadiṁ dānavadhvaṁsakanāgaḷintendaṁ

lg.l: ganeyoḷ tūgāḍe nīḍuntale paravaśadiṁ mecci kaṇmuccu tāhā

div.p: va.endu mattaṁ

lg.l: berasāntirvaga bāḷa bāysaḷa baliṁ piṅgalvivēḍaṁ gaḍā

div.p: va.āsabhāsanadindameddu
va.bandu purandaranaṁ sacivasumantri samanvitaṁ sukhāsīnanāgirdalli balabhadraṁ bhadrabalanembamātyamukhyana mogamaṁ nōḍi
va.endu nuḍida nītinirmaccarana pūrvapakṣasthāpanānukūlyamane sōmaprabhamahārājanīteṟadinanuvadisidaṁ
va.embudumābhadrabaḷanintendaṁ

va.ādoḍamennaṟuvanitanāṁ binnavisidappe nātmaparapakṣabāhulābahulateyumaṁ kṣayavr̥ddhisthānamumaṁ dēśakālapravartanamumaṁ pañcaprakāradoḷ vairakāraṇamumanāraydu negaṭṭiṅge jayasiddhi embudanuktasiddhamadaṟināmadhukaiṭabhanavananammantaraṁ sakalasāmagriḍoḷḷuśalakaṁ parasainyaśailakuliśatānavaprāyamantumallade
va.ādoḍaṁ namma bhujabalada vijigīṣuvr̥ttiyane mundiṭṭu pataṅgavr̥ttiyane negaḻvuducitavalladu samayōcitakke takkante negaḻvude mantramadentene

lg.l: tararernambi nammaṁ piḍiyadatibalaṁ māḷpa daṇḍakke daityaṁ

div.p: va.antu mūṟumupāyaparikaradoḷ dānōpāyamaṁ nevamāgi nilisi sōmaprabhasuprabhara manadoḷ mantaṇamirdante nuḍiyadeyuṁ nuḍida mantriya mātaṁ daityayamardanaṁ mārkoṇḍu
va.endu māṇade mattanintendaṁ

lg.l: nyāyaṁ mantrigaḷutti bappana mataṁ kālōcitaṁ nimmabhi

div.p: va.endu nuḍida mandaradharana daṇḍōpāyaprapañcamañcaṇḍagarjanamaṁ.. tarjitasandiyade nirjitavirōdhipratāpaprabhaṁsuprabhanantaramintu niścayisidaṁ
va.endu niścitamantrarāgi mantranikētanadiṁ pōṟamaḍuvāgaḷ

lg.l: surigempaṁ kitta kūrvāḷsiḍilanuguṭṭi kūrdāḍe bhūlōkamaṁ mu
rneramātaṁ munte bhō bhō kavi yenutamiral rākṣasaṁ rūkṣarūpaṁ॥

div.p: va.āmahādbhutapratipakṣarakṣanipuṇabhāvamaṁ kaṇmuṭṭinoḷ kaṇḍu
va.āgi makuṭataṭaghaṭitahastakuṭmaḷaṁ hastapallavaprasaritapārijātaprasūnābhyarcitarāmadāmōdaracaraṇanakhatāmarasanintendaṁ—dēva nimmirvaruṁ pūrvajanmadoḷ

lg.l: ravacūḍaṁ taḷḷu nāmuṁ taḍamaḍiveḍeyoḷ bhōṅkadaḍḍesi mātiṁ

div.p: va.enna pesar maṇicūḍanembudu
va.endu baṭiyanintendaṁ

va.embuduṁ citralateginnondatirāgalatājñānahastaṁ tamage hastagatamāda khēcaravidye niśācaranaṁ gelvudakke nigamavādantirākṣaṇaṁ digvijayōdyuktarāgi balādhyakṣanaṁ paḍege sājalveddāvijayaprayāṇabhēriyaṁ sūsaloḍaṁ

lg.l: bhisi tāḷaṁ kūḍi kōḷāhaḷamayamenisālgai mūlōkamaṁ mu

div.p: va.ā prayāṇabhērībhāṅkāravemba hūṅkāradoḷe gr̥hamahataramahēndrajāti karākarṣaṇaṁ māḍidante purabahirvaṇada parisarappadēśadoḷ

lg.l: giḍuvaṁ sārdudu gaṇḍupōdage pasumbaṁ kathe kabbaḷḷi baṁ
tivuri guḍi gūḍāraṁ jhampāḷi caukige jampe maṁ
bivadi pasuriṁ karpiṁ kempiṁ basantana bīḍiniṁ
ṇiya cemboṅgaṭṭu taḷaḍḍaṇada poḷepu kendūḷiyindondi kemba

div.p: va.antu biṭṭa vijayaprasthānaśibiradiṁ taḷardu niccavayaṇadinetti barpannegamittal

lg.l: rdādaityādhīśanaṁ kaṇḍeṟagi baṭike mundikkutuṁ prākr̥taṁ rā
jādēśaṁ kāḷmeyāgintire nuḍidanidēṁ dēva nīnaṭṭi bēḷvaṁ

div.p: va.adalladeyuṁ

lg.l: duvarambol cōdyamē korvida kuṟubi pugadē bāṇasaṁ orme bandā

div.p: va.endu bhujabalōdrēkamaṁ nuḍiva madhuvina vidhuvadanavaḷayadantarkāmudiyināsabhāsamudrakṣōbhamasadaḷamappanamahamahamikeyineṟva subhaṭapēṭakadoḷ paṭṭatarada gajasādanādhipati mannaṇiya maimeya dānavasēnāniyorvaṁ

lg.l: ḷkoḍa nr̥pēndra kaṭṭadoḍe bīrada baṭṭege kaidugaṭṭidēṁ

div.p: va.ene mattorvaṁ khēcarabhūcarapatipratānada mottamodaligaṁ muṅgeyya kaṅkaṇamaṁ tirimpi nūṅkutuṁ jāḍuva jhaḷavaṭṭigeyanēṟpe sārcuttumeṭṭu
va.ātanimbacika daityayacakravartiya mātulaṁ karāḷakaṇṭhaṁ

lg.l: havadondoḍe meṭṭi sīḍide biḍeṁ ninnāṇi kēḷ rāmakē

div.p: va.ene mattōrvaṁ
va.antu masagi vīrālāpakōlāhalavanuttambhitahastakaṅkaṇajhaṅkāraṁ munne jhaṅkisi baṭikke madhukaiṭabhanintendaṁ
va.endu nivārisuttuṁ

va.eddu kubēraṁ munne bharakkaṭṭi kappavitta puṣpakavimānavaṁ vidyādharaskandhavāhakaravaṭaisi ka madavēṟu. dudanēṟu poṟamaḍuvāgaḷ mēredappidavāridhicatu ka. catuḥ kadanamuṅgoḷa. ........taraṅgasahasraṁ gaḷante nirdēśita skandhāvārambaramaḷumbamāda sainikadoḷage

lg.l: kaṭṭiduvettisōrva madamaṁ kiḍe ḍeṅkipa hasti kaṇṇanī
riṭṭuvu daṇḍeyiṁ keṟadu keṇḍamudagrahayāḷi nurgi mē
goṭṭida kaidugaḷsuyidu ninduvu tērdhare nuṅgidante sā
liṭṭuvu munde kaṭṭi dōṟeyaṁ neṟedurci padātihētigaḷ

div.p: va.adaṁ kaṇḍu keladoḷ barpa mantrimahattararoḷāda gujugujiyaṁ kivigivigēḷdu divijaddhipaṁ pāvakarṇakana magaṅgintendaṁ

lg.l: idu dal digvijayaṁ raṇājiradoḷārānuṁ bharaṅgeydu tā

div.p: va.endu tōṟidutpātakke seḍeyadeyuṁ poṟabīḍinoḷaḍeyadeyuṁ ṣaḍaṅgabalavāhinīvārāṁnidhānaṁ sapādalakṣākṣauhiṇivallabhanetti barpāgaḷ

va.antu niccavayaṇadivetti naḍedu suprabhapuruṣōttamara biṭṭa bīḍiṅge kaṭṭidiroḷ nissāḷaśabdhaśravaṇamātramanaḷavigoṭṭu biṭṭa maṟudivasamudayasamayadoḷudayisuva sahasrakaramaṇḍalakke māṟaṅkamāda tējaḥpratāpaṁ mūjagamaneyde kaṇṇuḷḷi beḷḷusuvinegaṁ pariva pāṟuva śarabhaṅgaḷ pūḍida ponna kattaḷarannada besugeyoḷage piḍida muttina kīloḷe biḍade bīsuva palavu cāmarada biccaḷipa kuḷikana ka. puvige paḍiyigeya pajavaḍiyumeḍadoḷaṁ baladoḷamaḷavaḍisi ninda daṇḍigaḷa daṇḍanāyakara dānavasēnādigaḷa kaḍavaḍaṅgaḷuṁ mārgaprahāraprahanyamānajanyatūryanirghōṣaṅgaḷuṁ yamaghaṇṭāsamūhajayaghaṇṭāsahasrasampuṭana kōḷāhaḷaṅgaḷumābhīḷamāge koḷudoḍḍida padmavyūhaśakaṭavyūhādinānāvyūhasamūhakke tanna bāhāsāhasame sannāhamappinamaraneleyaniṁ kēvaḷasuracakrādhipanoḷoḍḍi nindāgaḷ

lg.l: adu bandoḍḍittu raudrādbhutabharadi ka. rasadi. nelemuṭṭi tākāśamaṁ su
hada biṟpaṁ nōḍi bīḍuṁ puḷakada kaḷe puṭṭalke bāhātuḷādaṁ
ḍade tūgalpāltumembantire muramathanaṁ nōḍidaṁ tanna mudbaṁ

div.p:
va.āgaḷ vimānayānavāhanapāḷīkētanātapatracamarajakadam-
bada bambal turugaluṁ tamatamage meṟeye tintiṇigoṇḍu

lg.l: vanikāyaṁ giriśādidikṣatati ka. dikṣatigaḷuṁ. paulōmyā didēvīgaṇaṁ

div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasantasantānārāma rāmacandra
munīndra prasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇakiraṇa prasannāntaḥ
karaṇa kavicakravartibiruda kavibhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva
viracitamappa anantanāthapurāṇadoḷ suprabha
puruṣōttamasamarārambhavarṇanaṁ
trayōdaśāśvāsaṁ
sampūrṇaṁ

div.head: caturdaśāśvāsaṁ
div.p:
va.antoḍane kaivīse eraḍuṁ balaṅgaḷisuva yiḍuvayiruva
poyya, nālkuṁ tejada śastrāśastra mukhaṅgaḷoḷ taṭṭuntāyiṁ bīḻca
caturaṅgappa tanāpratanada tumulasamarasaṅghaṭṭa nākāṇḍapracaṇḍapraḷaya
prakṣōbhadoḷage

va.antu kuntākuntiyuṁ śastrāśastriyuṁ khaḍgākhaṭṭiyu
mādaka. mādodervalada kāḷegada kaṇmuṭṭinoḷondambuvīḍinoḷage

lg.l: madagandhakke parasparaṁ masagi kōpāṭōpadiṁ taḷḷu tā
gida dantaṅgaḷa kiccu patti taguḷḷandaḷombinaṁ būdi pā
ttida beṭṭaṁ poṇarvante pōrduvu gajavyūhaṁ gajavyūhadoḷ
telapaṁ niṭṭisi pokku pāydu liva ghōḍāykarkaḷiṁ vāji ku
lku biyuṁ nettara pūramuṁ negedu kaṇṇimbāytu bānemba keṁ

div.p:
va.āsamarasambhramadoḷ poṟajeyoḷ kāloṟṟidu ninda
mandarācaladharanagaḷidegeda mogada harigeyiṁ mugila terevaḷigedegeda
baṟasiḍilanteyuṁ miḷḷida gajada mogarambade teredegeda tāṇḍavadharanaṁ
teyuṁ dōrvaḷāṭōpadagurva0 taḷedu battīsakaḍiya bāhara
puṭada guḷavada kaṇaṅgaḷa suḷiśadaḷaṁ paḷakada pāraḍadujjaḷikeyuṁ tuḷi
lasandaraṁ praḷayakke saṅgaḷisi negeda panneraḍuvarkabimbaṅgaḷanokkaisi
tegedu mēloṭṭikoṇḍanteyuṁ mēruvina śikharada koḷalubaḷeda
tāḷabanavanāḷigoṇḍu pombesada besugeya pimbakkadoḷe nīḍuṁ
bīsida kariya biḷiya jhallariya pulliya kadaḷikeya kaḍupiniṁ brahmāṇḍa
bhāṇḍamanaḍakilpaḍapuvanteyuṁ madajaḷada kadaḍaṁ kadalu kedaruva karṇa
cāmarada kattale sirppina bāharakkeyuṁ bokkarisida tōrahastadinavanī
taḷamaṁ kavaḷamaṅkoḷalendu siḍiliṁ kaḍegaṇisida rāhuvina horaḷe
nuruḷegavidanteyuṁ meṭṭida bharakke dharaṇiyōrguḍise cuturaṅgabala
manituṁ citrada palageyaṁ toḍageḍavidantaḷḷāḍi taḷḷaṅkugeḍeyeyuṁ
naḍedu banda vīrajaḷappananubhayabalada naḍuve nīḍi biṭṭikke raviya
pāydu tanna balamaṁ bennikkikoṇḍu nindāgaḷ

va.antu nindaḷaviyoḷ dommaḷisi nūṅkuva daityayacakriya
caturaṅgabalamumanitumonde mukhadoḷ kaikoṇḍu nijagajaghaṭāpaṭa
lakke sūciyāneyaṁ māḍi tammoḷonde meykoḷaṇidu nūṅkidaḷa
variyoḷ peṇidaṇidu pōṟci muridiyidu sīṭi maraḷe poṟaḷḷi
nūṅkuva uruḷe karuḷḷi nūṅkuva tēnatēnaṁ tividu bānoḷīḍā
ḍuva duguṇatiguṇaṁ tiṟadu desevaligeya nighātadantadaṇḍaṅgaḷa kiḍiya
keṇḍaṅgaḷoḷ pakṣakakṣaṅgaḷanuccaḷisi negeva nettara suṭṭuregaḷoḷaṁ koḍa
nūṟci keḍeva madagajaṅgaḷuri pattidaṭṭageyoṭṭilantirduvu । mattaṁ
kalpāntakr̥tāntanemba bēḍana keyya kāḷadaṇḍadantire poḍeva poḍedu
piḍidu seḷeva seḷedu maraḷḷuva maraḷḷi ghanada ghāyadoḷ tattaṟiduyava
taṟuda kaḍigaḷaṁ biḍade mēloṭṭikoḷḷa karacaṇḍaghātadoḷ toṇḍugeḍada
turagadaḷaṅgaḷuṁ baḷisiḍila baḷagaṁ candaṇada permaragāḍaṁ tiṇḍugeḍa
pidantirduvu । mattaṁ mittu dēvateya mottarisuva māriyumekke
kaiyinikkuva musala daṇḍadante tottaḷaduṭidu sutti suṭidogedora
suva kālakambhaṅgaḷoḷanubbaravetti nirvaraṁ poyya tāḷavaṭṭadoḷaṁ tivaḷi
vaṭṭamāda tēratekkegaḷa kalla gāṇada kaṇiya bāyge biṭṭi kaḷikeya beṇḍi
nante nurgunuliyāgirduvu । mattaṁ bhairavana javana palla pajjiya
ballaṇi nūkidantiraṇiyaraṁ noṇiva nakhamukhada koḷoḷ jīvavuṭidu
ṭidante nettara neṇada kāragalisinōraṇigeḍada khēcara bhūcara niśācara
pajji pratānaṁ javanuṇḍu kāyi kaḍaliṭṭantirirdudu antu tanna balama
nitumardhanāriya baladantiraḍaṅgiyuṁ vr̥ddhana baladantiraṭidupōgi
yuṁ haraḍeya baladantiradavalanodavipuvantumalladeyuṁ

lg.l: poḍavi kaḍaṅgi ninduguḷu doḍḍida citrada bhittiyaṁ siḍi
paḍaliḍe kr̥ṣṇanondu gajadiṁ nijavāhini kaṇḍu dānavaṁ
kiḍikiḍivōgi tāṁ poreda naccina maccina daityarellaraṁ

div.p:
va.adbhutanudbhaṭaṁ kuñjarakarṇanaścaṅkaṭhanuṣōdaranēkajaṅghana
nēkalōcananudaravadanaṁ khuranāśaṁ kharasannaṣṭapatākaṁ pātāḷakētu
tāḷanigaraṇaṁ jvālālōmaṁ kālacakraṁ karāḷanakharanarāladāḍana
jāṇḍappaṣṭaṁ bhujaṅgabāhupadaṅgapālavembavarmodalāda pesara
pesaracukeya lakkelekkada rakkasara nāyakaranekkekkiyiṁ mūdalisi besase

lg.l: deḻaguṁva beṭṭamāgi biḍadottuva kattaleyāgi mutti bē

div.p:
va.ā mahādbhuta raudra vīravikramapracaṇḍapraḷayadoḷ mandaraṁ
gelvante mandaradharaṁ nindu mārkoṇḍu

lg.l: hutiyaṁ tōmara śaṅku mudgara musuṇḍī piṇḍivāḷaṅgaḷiṁ

div.p: va.mattaṁ

lg.l: ppinegaṁ mārpaḍe kaṇḍu hēsi haḷi bandaḍḍesi būtaṭṭidaṁ

div.p:
va.antu būtaṭṭi bhūtaḷāgradoḷubhayabalada karituraganara
kōṭigaḷa pēraṭṭeya beṭṭugaḷoḷaṁ pariva nore nettarakāṟuṅgaḷoḷ
kāleḍegāṇade nidāghasamayada bayallogeyantalōhitasyandananāgi
piḍida vajrajvāleyemba kōdaṇḍadaṇḍada caṇḍaprabheyoḷaṅgavaṭṭadoḷ
toṭṭu meṟeva ponna rannada sannaṇada beḷaginoḷamabhyantarāḷasamadhyu
dgatabhānuvinante viyattaḷadoḷ taḷattaḷisi tāḷadhvajanāntu nindāgaḷ

va.antu negedu ninda rajanīcaracakriya niśācarakhēcara
bhūcara camūcakraṁ cakradharāgrajaṅgākramisi kaviyaloḍaṁ

va.mattamitta gajārūḍhanāgi kāduttumirdu kāḷiyamardanaṁ
pandaleya tandaloḍavaṭṭegaḷanaṭṭeyenoḷaṁ cummane kavida nettara
permaḍegaḷoḷaṁ nyūmasaṅgrāmavanakṣaramanayidu peṟige nindarene
leyoḷagrajanaṁ kāṇade

va.mārkoṇḍarātibalamanāṅkegoṇḍagrajātanaṁ kaikoṇḍu
tāne muṅkoṇḍu nindu
va.antu negaṭṭu samarāvaṣṭambhamāḍambaramanappu keydu
va.adalladeyuṁ

va.antu muṭṭi mūdalisi veṭṭinindecca biccarikegoccataṁ kaḷardu
dhareyuṁ diktaṭamuṁ viyatpaṭalamuṁ dhārākarōtpātadiṁ
tiriguttirpenegaṁ tirippi madhu kōpāṭōpadindiṭṭoḍu ।

va.antātrikhaṇḍamaṇḍaḷādhipatiya rājyalakṣmi cakravartiprabhāva
maṁ tandu tanagōlagisida ratnapātradante balada bhujadoḷ taḷataḷi
sutirda cakraratnamaṁ kaḷedukoṇḍu

lg.l: anilapathakke pāyi tale pōpina kōvaracakradante ti
munidoḍe bhaṭṭaguttana kaṭāradavol neṟe tanna kayduta

div.p: va.samanantaraṁ

va.antu barpa cakravartiya vīralakṣmiya lakṣmīvayasyeyaraṁ
dūradoḷe nōḍi sāredegedappal kareva puralakṣmiya kaṇṇuḍiya kara

lg.l: pallavaṅgaḷa pariyaṁ miḷirdu masagisuva nikāravaṭṭeya guḍiya tuyi
galoḷaṁ sakala lakṣmījanārdanaṅge sārda mālesūḍalettida svayaṁ
yoḷodavida rāgaṁ paridu parvi pasarisuvante kērikērigaḷoḷ

div.p:
va.antu kaṇḍu tammanibaruṁ bēṟuvēṟe paṭṭadānegaḷaṁ pakke
sāregaḷa kāyabaḷada kattaleyaṁ muttina māṇikada sattigeyaṁ beḷagutte
beḷagumāḍi śaṅkhabhērīdundubhigabhīradhvaniyiṁ kāhaḷebahaḷabahuvidhadhyā
nadiṁ koṇakuharamaṇḍalabahaḷaṁmāḍe puramaṁ pugutarppāgaḷ madila
māḷigeya nelemāḍada davaḷārada mattavāraṇamāṭakūṭaprāsādaṅgaḷa
bīdivīdigaḷādalegaḷoḷ nindu nōḍal neṟeda purapurandhrījanada
tintiṇigaḷoḷage

lg.l: pāṅgame bāsigaṁ miḷirva mēludu beḷḷuḍi tōraṇaṁ kuru
praṇayaṁ kaimige māḍidaḷgeṭṭa nēpathyōdyamaṁ māṇbu ka

div.p:
va.mattorvaḷ kaṅkaṇada kiṅkiṇiya nēvuradabbaraṁ nelanuna
gūḍisuvantiraḍigaḍige poḍare naḍetandu nindāgaḷ

lg.l: paḍepaḍe pāytu mellerdege gharmajalaṁ konarvānanakke su
gr̥ḍedu teraḷu dāhari nirīkṣipa nītiya sōlta bhāvamaṁ

div.p: va.mattaṁ

va.antu tamatamage kavvaregoṇḍu nōḍuva mugdhamadhyama
nāyakīnikāyidoḷage

lg.l: ṇṇaḷa beḷḷiṁ meyya karpiṁ naḍuve gajada mēloppuvīkr̥ṣṇanendā

div.p:
va.antu nōḍi gāḍikārtiyara kaṇmalaraṁ sēsegoṇḍu
cittamaṁ kavartegoṇḍu yādavābhyudayarājahaṁsaṁ rājabhavanamaṁ
pokku rājāṅgaṇadoḷ sakaḷarājalōkakke samucitasanmānadānaṁ
gaḷiṁ bīḷkoṭṭu kaḷupi karumāḍada mundaṇa bhuvanatrayābharaṇa
memboḍōlagasāleya vaḍḍaparada ratnasiṁhāsanamanalaṅkarisi maṅga
ḷācāraṁ cārunīrājanasaṅgītātōdyahr̥dyanirghōṣaṁ nīraḍa
pathakke bhūṣaṇavāge taṇḍataṇḍadiṁ meṟeva daṇḍamaṇḍalādhīśamaṇḍaḷika
makuṭabaddha praśastadarśanōpāyanavarcanāviḷāsaṁ gōsanevaḍeye

lg.l: goḷe bāykeḷisi kīrti vartise digantaṁ tammutirvanirarā
dade pogaṭuttu moldagalalāgide matte maruḷu pokkaḷā
duvaraṁ kandida dharmamaṁ beḷagi dharmādarśamaṁ puṇyadiṁ

div.p:
va.endu purandarana vijñāpanōpacāradoḍane vr̥ndāraka
vr̥ndabāhāparighaparivāritadaivikāsthāniprasthānabhērībhāṅkāraṁ śaṅkā
kuḷitaduritaharaṇaṁ berci perci gaganadiśābhūmibhāgamaṁ taḷkoydu
muppurigūḍidāgaḷ

va.endu paramānandame rūpugoṇḍandadiṁ gondaṇisi nindu
sandaṇisi

lg.l: kari mēṣaṁ mahiṣaṁ nr̥mūrti makaraṁ sāraṅgamaśvaṁ vr̥ṣaṁ
bare muntaṁ poḍevaṭṭa kai pogaṭṭi bāycelbāge tantamma di

div.p: va.mattaṁ
va.ā paramatapōvanaprayāṇaprabhāvadoḷ

va.antu nirmēghaṁ surivamōghadivyavacanavarṣāgamadoḷ
kumatavādivanakr̥ṣṇavartma0 kundi naḍeyeyuṁ, paṇḍitamānamana
spaṁśayamarumarīcike suruḷi pariyeyuṁ, kumārgōpadēśakama
rāḷajāḷaṁ paṭṭane pāṟeyuṁ, mithyāvādipēṭakar dantisantānadante
muruṇṭiyuma bhavyajinamanaḥpadarajaḥpaṭaḷaṁ tamaḷḷi paridaḍaṅgeyuṁ,
duṣpariṇāmajana hr̥dayavidāri kādrōṇikegaḷ mucci musuṅkeyuṁ
vinēyajanacētaścātakaṁ taṇidu kuṇiyal pāyiyuṁ, agaṇyapuṇya
taraṅgiṇigaḷ karegaṇma pariyeyuṁ, dayārasanīrataṭākaṁ tīvi tuḷuṅki
kōḍi maraḷeyuṁ, dānatīrtha sarōvaraṅgaḷpodalvaṭṭeyuṁ, samyagā
cāracāruparaṅgaḷpodalvaṭṭeyuṁ podaḷvaḍeda saddharmapīyūṣama
hāpravāhaṁ vaṅgamaṇḍaladoḷ taraṅgaṅgoṇḍu kaḷiṅgamaṇḍaladoḷ
maḍugaṭṭi nindu mahārāṣṭramaṇḍaladoḷaṭṭumbarivaridu maḷaya
maṇḍaladoḷ vēḷegoṇḍu nelasi gujjaramaṇḍaladoḷojjarambaridu
marumaṇḍaḷadoḷ paṟepuvaḍedu danujamanujatiryakṣamājamaṁ sukr̥ta
bhājanaṁmāḍi permegāśīrmavādudu.

lg.l: ā duritēbhasiṁhana sabhāvaḷayaṁ baṟakeydu dattu sa

div.p:
va.ā dharādharada divyakasthaḷadanēkānōkahacchāyācchannapā
vana pradēśadoḷ paridu parvida śuddhaspaṭika śilāpaṭṭadalli

va.antu pūrvābhimukhanāgi nindu nelasida samādhiniṣṭhe
yoḷ prathamasūkṣmakriyāpratipāditamappa śukladhyānamanappu keydu
karmalāghavaparipācanaśaktiyiṁ paramaudārikadēhatriguṇabāhula
dinantarmūhūrtadoḷ viśvaviṣṭapavistāritadaṇḍakavāṭapratarapūraṇa
vemba samucchayatacatuṣṭayamananukramadineydisi tattadupasaṁhr̥tivyu
tkramadiṁ pūrvaśarīrapramāṇadoḷ nelasi baṭiyamuṭida ghātigaḷaṁ
sthitikarmakke sakka sarimāḍi gupta manōvākkāyayōgadinayōgikē
vaḷiguṇasthānamanaḷaṅkarisi tr̥tīyaśukladhyānadinasūkṣmakāyasthitiyoḷ
śīlaguṇasamānasampūrṇamāge saṁśuddha sakalāsravaṁ lapanōccārita
pañcākṣaramātradoḷ samucchinnaprāṇāpānasamāraṇapracāravāgi
samucchinnakriyānivr̥ttiyemba paramaśukladhyānadoḷ nindu nijō
pāntasamayadoḷ

va.anantaramanantanāthacaramasamayadoḷābhyantaravēdanīya
manuṣyagatipañcēndriyajātyānupūrvibādaraparyāptiśubhagādē
yayaśaḥkīrtiruccairgotratīrthakarākhyānamembivādiyāgi
va.ā siddhakṣētraventuṭendoḍe

va.āgaḷāparamēśvarana parinirvāṇakalyāṇa samabhyarcanōtsuka
cittanāgi

lg.l: kedaruva sausavaṁ taḷiva lāje toḍarcuva tōraṇaṅgaḷe
ttida guḍi potta kannaḍi negappida poṅgaḷasaṅgaḷoppe baṁ
toḷaguva tōramuttugaḷa puñjamo nīlada puñjamo poyvavā

div.p: va.antu viyattaḷadindiḷidu iḷāmaṇḍaḷakkavatarisi

lg.l: iḷeyaṁ kyōmamumaṁ taḍaṅgalisi dikcakrakke sindikke maṁ

div.p:
va.anantaguṇaniḷayananantanāthanaṁ tīrthavallabhavanāliṅgisida
niścayasaśrīya sirimañcada keḷage poḷeva paḷivāvugeyante paḷaccanā
daccavaḷukina samādhiśilāpaṭṭakamumindrasamājamumindrāgaṇavuṁ
kōṭikōṭiprabhegaḷa tumbiguruḷaḷoḷ nilumbi meṟeva cinna
pūdugula ratnakenna kempugaḷa berakeveḷagu vāsavaśarāsanada vāsa
ṇigeyakke nindu

va.endu parinirvāṇakalyāṇapradēśame samastamaṅgaḷavastu
vistīrṇamāge savistaramārādhisi samanantaraṁ samānasamādhisaṅgata
pragatakēvaḷinicayacētakaḷasakaṅgaḷoḷ navaratnaracitaprakr̥tipradānamaṁ
bēṟe vēḷe nilisi dēvēndravr̥ndamanitumānandarasadōkuḷiyāḍe
saudharmēndraṁ niṭilataṭaghaṭitakarakamalakuṭmaḷanuṁ jayajayōttā
ritamukharavamukhamaṇḍaḷanumāgi

lg.l: bedaṟu subōdhamaṁ beḷagidunnati lōkamanuydu ruṇḍu tē

div.p:
va.endu kīrtisiyumarcisiyuṁ pūjisiyuṁ nōḍiyuṁ
taṇiyude
div.label: mallikāmāle

lg.l: kṣōṇiyaṁ payadēvol baḷḷaḷa baḷḷisuttire mikka di
haḷitasyānta ga. ja. ra. nanantaraṁ nelege paulōmimanōvallabhaṁ
smarapūjāvidhiyaṁ negaṭṭi baṭiyaṁ vākpūjeyaṁ matte bi
nōḍuva peṇṇa kaṇṇa kaḍe sōlisalārpave bhāḷalōcanaṁ
rdude dēvavrajadoḷu dēśa mudadiṁ vyākhyānamaṁ māḍi kē
rasamudraṁ mēru tāṁ māḍisida sobaga śāntīśvarāvāsadoḷ sthā

div.trailer:
gadyaidu paramajinasamaya vanavasantasantānārāma rāmacandra munīndra
prasādāsādita ratnatrayābharaṇakiraṇa prasannāntaḥkaraṇa kavicakravartibiruda
kavidhāḷalōcana janārdanadēva viracitamappa anantanāthapurāṇadoḷ
parinirvāṇakalyāṇavarṇanaṁ caturdaśāśvāsaṁ sampūrṇaṁ.
anantanātha purāṇaṁ sampūrṇaṁ.
